ReasoningLens addresses information necropsy by: (1) structuring traces into interactive hierarchies that separate high-level strategy from low-level execution; (2) leveraging an agentic auditor for automated error detection and tool-augmented verification; and (3) synthesizing systemic reasoning profiles to reveal model-specific blind spots. By transforming unstructured walls of text into actionable insights, ReasoningLens provides a modular foundation for interpreting, debugging, and optimizing the next generation of reasoning-centric AI.

</details>


### [149] [UnBias-Plus: Detect, Explain, and Rewrite Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23412)
*Ahmed Y. Radwan,Ahmed ElKady,Sindhuja Chaduvula,Mohamed Hafez,Amrit Krishnan,Shaina Raza*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: UnBias-Plus 是一个开源工具包，支持细粒度的多类别偏见分类、偏见片段定位、中立改写以及推理解释，提供多种接口访问方式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有偏见检测方法仅能识别偏见是否存在，缺乏细粒度检测、可解释的推理、中立改写以及开源可用模型的支持。

Method: UnBias-Plus 统一了四个功能：(1) 片段级多类别偏见分类，(2) 偏见片段定位，(3) 中立文本改写，(4) 每个决策的推理解释。通过 Python、CLI、REST API 和 Web 界面提供访问。

Result: 构建了一个开源工具包，涵盖多种接口，并公开了代码、模型、数据集和文档。

Conclusion: UnBias-Plus 通过提供全面的偏见分析功能（检测、定位、改写、推理）并以开源形式发布，弥补了现有方法的不足，促进了可访问的偏见分析。

Abstract: Bias in natural language remains a persistent challenge in both human-written and AI-generated content, affecting domains such as journalism, education, and AI research. Most existing detection methods identify only the presence of bias, with limited support for granular detection, interpretable explanations, neutral rewriting, and openly available trained models. We present UnBias-Plus, an open-source toolkit unifying (1) segment-level multi-class bias classification, (2) biased span localization, (3) neutral text rewriting, and (4) reasoning for each decision. Available via Python, CLI, REST API, and web interfaces, UnBias-Plus supports accessible bias analysis. The toolkit, source code, models, datasets, and documentation are publicly available.

</details>


### [150] [TriggerBench: Investigating Prospective Memory for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23459)
*Tianhua Zhang,Xinjiang Wang,Qianxi Zhang,Qi Chen,Kun Li,Yaoqi Chen,Dingdong Wang,Helen Meng,Yan Lu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TriggerBench是一个评估大语言模型前瞻记忆（PM）能力的综合基准，涵盖五个维度。研究发现：PM存在精确率-召回率权衡和注意力脆弱性；PM比回溯记忆（RM）更难，随上下文长度增加性能急剧下降；PM可作为推理能力的行为探针，与数学问题表现正相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM评估主要关注通过显式查询的回溯记忆（RM），而前瞻记忆（PM）——在无直接提示下自发回忆并执行潜在约束的关键能力——尚未得到系统评估。

Method: 构建TriggerBench基准，涵盖日常助手和专业工作流五个维度。每对场景配备匹配的RM控制、对比的正/负变体以及过载触发器，在单一协议下实现主动召回、误报率和注意力鲁棒性的细粒度测量。

Result: (i) PM存在精确率-召回率权衡和注意力脆弱性，增强推理可提升主动召回但可能导致"总是提醒"启发式过拟合，隐式约束或触发器过载下PM性能显著下降；(ii) PM显著难于RM，RM在100K token内接近饱和而PM随上下文长度急剧衰减；(iii) PM可作为推理能力的探针，在相同上下文长度下，成功解决AIME-2025数学问题的轨迹对应的PM准确率更高。

Conclusion: 鲁棒的前瞻记忆仍然是LLM面临的开放挑战，PM表现与备用推理容量相关，揭示了token数量无法反映的推理预算。

Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long interactions, existing evaluations focus predominantly on retrospective memory (RM) via explicit queries. Prospective memory (PM), the critical ability to spontaneously recall and act on latent constraints without direct prompts, remains largely unevaluated. We introduce TriggerBench, a comprehensive PM benchmark spanning five dimensions across both daily assistants and professional workflows. TriggerBench pairs scenarios with matched RM controls, contrastive positive/negative variants, and overloaded triggers, enabling fine-grained measurement of proactive recall, false-alarm rate, and attentional robustness under a single protocol. Our evaluation yields three key findings. (i) PM shows a precision-recall trade-off and attentional fragility. Though enhanced reasoning significantly improves proactive recall, models may overfit to an "always-remind" heuristic. Furthermore, PM accuracy degrades substantially under implicit constraints or triggers overloaded by concurrent user requests, indicating that robust PM remains an open challenge. (ii) PM is notably harder than RM: on identical contexts, RM near-saturates up to 100K tokens, while PM decays sharply as context length scales. (iii) PM may serve as a behavioral probe of spare reasoning capacity. Pairing PM scenarios with AIME-2025 math problems reveals that successful trajectories yield higher PM accuracy than failed ones at the same context length, showing PM tracks spare reasoning budget that token count obscures. Project page: https://github.com/KristenZHANG/TriggerBench-Official.

</details>


### [151] [War in the Abstract: The Rise and Consequences of Militarized Language in Scientific Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23462)
*Sovesh Mohapatra,David Lydon-Staley,Dani S. Bassett*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 通过对2010-2025年间2140万篇论文摘要的分析，发现军事化语言使用率上升48%-32%，且与全球冲突数据高度相关；实验表明战争框架降低了可信度、资助意愿和政策支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管科学家并非以战争为职业，但军事化词汇却频繁出现在科学摘要中。作者旨在量化这种语言渗透程度，并因果性地检验军事化语言对说服力的影响。

Method: 分析OpenAlex和PubMed中2140万篇论文摘要（2010-2025），计算军事化术语出现频率；结合Uppsala冲突数据检验国别和年度相关性；开展被试内战争框架实验（N=801, 32,040次试验），测量可信度、资助意愿、政策支持和紧迫感。

Result: 军事化术语出现率在OpenAlex上升48%，PubMed上升32%，2019年后加速；与全球冲突数据高度相关（r=0.77-0.84）；全球南方增长最快；社会科学水平最高，工程和计算机科学增长最快；COVID和LLM时代缩小了母语与非英语作者的差距。实验显示战争框架降低可信度（d_z=-0.28）、资助意愿（d_z=-0.12）和政策支持（d_z=-0.08），紧迫感有趋势性上升（d_z=+0.07）。

Conclusion: 科学摘要正日益军事化，但这种军事化语言可能侵蚀可信度、资助意愿和政策支持，产生与预期相反的沟通效果。

Abstract: Scientists do not, by profession, wage war. Yet warfare's vocabulary consistently appears in their abstracts. To quantify the extent to which warfare's vocabulary pervades scientific abstracts, we analyze 21.4 million papers (2010-2025; OpenAlex, PubMed). We additionally run a within-subject war-framing experiment (N = 801; 32,040 trials) designed to provide causal insight into the effects of militaristic language on persuasion. Between 2010 and 2025, the presence of militaristic terms in scientific abstracts rose 48% in OpenAlex and 32% in PubMed, with the rise accelerating sharply after 2019 (cross-database r = 0.96, p < 10^-8). The prevalence of militaristic language is conflict-aligned at both country and annual scales (Uppsala Conflict Data Program; r = 0.77-0.84), with the abstracts from the Global South displaying the fastest rise in militaristic language. Among disciplines, social sciences leads in level of such language while engineering and computer science lead in growth. The COVID and post-2022 large-language-model eras also saw the rise and narrowed the language gap between native-English and non-English authors. In our follow-up experiment, we found that war framing reduced credibility (mean shift -0.18 Likert units, 95% CI [-0.21, -0.14]; d_z = -0.28, p < 10^-20), funding willingness (d_z = -0.12) and policy support (d_z = -0.08), with a trend-level increase in sense of urgency (d_z = +0.07). Collectively, findings reveal that while scientific abstracts drift toward warfare, the use of militaristic language may erode credibility, funding willingness, and policy support.

</details>


### [152] [Self-Compacting Language Model Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23525)
*Tianjian Li,Jingyu Zhang,William Jurayj,Xi Wang,Chuanyang Jin,Mehrdad Farajtabar,Eric Nalisnick,Daniel Khashabi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SelfCompact是一种让模型自主决定何时及如何压缩长推理轨迹的脚手架方法。它结合压缩工具和轻量级规则，无需微调即可实现自适应压缩，在数学推理和智能体搜索任务中显著提升性能并降低token成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长代理轨迹中的链式思考和工具调用会产生陈旧内容，锚定后续生成并最终超出上下文窗口。现有固定间隔压缩策略忽略轨迹结构，可能导致部分结果在推理或搜索过程中被误丢弃。

Method: 提出SelfCompact脚手架，包含两个核心组件：(i) 压缩工具，由模型自主调用以总结累积的上下文；(ii) 轻量级规则，指定何时触发压缩（子任务已解决或轨迹正在收敛）以及何时抑制压缩（推理中途或陷入停滞）。两者协同工作，无需微调或外部监督。

Result: 在六个基准测试和七个模型上的实验表明：SelfCompact在数学任务上相比无压缩基线最高提升18.1分，在智能体搜索任务上提升5-9分，同时每问题成本降低30-70%。

Conclusion: 未受提示的模型无法可靠判断自身上下文何时"腐化"，但轻量级规则可弥合这一元认知差距。压缩时机的判断是脚手架无需训练即可提供的能力。

Abstract: Long agent traces composed of chains of thought and tool calls accumulate stale content that anchor subsequent generations, and eventually outgrow the context window. Existing scaffolds mitigate it with fixed-interval compaction triggered at a token threshold. Such triggers pay no heed to trajectory structure, risking discard of partial results mid-derivation or mid-search. We propose SelfCompact, a scaffold that allows the model itself to decide when and how to compact. Specifically, it pairs two inference-time elements: (i) a compaction tool the model invokes to summarize the accumulated context, and (ii) a lightweight rubric specifying when to fire (a sub-task has resolved, or the trajectory is converging) and when to suppress (mid-derivation, or when stuck). Both are needed. The tool alone is unevenly used across open-weight models, often invoked at unhelpful moments or not at all; the rubric alone cannot act. Together, they elicit effective adaptive compaction without any fine-tuning or external supervision. We present empirical results on six benchmarks (competitive math and agentic search) and seven models. Our results show that SelfCompact matches or exceeds fixed-interval summarization at a fraction of the token cost, improving over a no-summarization baseline by up to 18.1 points on math and 5-9 points on agentic search at 30-70% lower per-question cost. Our results expose a meta-cognitive gap: although unprompted models cannot reliably tell when their own context is rotting, a lightweight rubric closes this gap, reframing when to compact as a capability that scaffolds can supply without training.

</details>


### [153] [LangMAP: A Language-Adaptive Approach to Tokenization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23566)
*Clara Meister,Suchir Salhan,Andrzej Szablewski,Pietro Lesci,Paula Buttery,Tiago Pimentel*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出LangMAP分词方案，通过扩展UnigramLM算法到多语言设置，在共享词表上实现语言特定分词，无需改变词表即可适配预训练模型，在多种语言上改善形态边界对齐，但在下游任务上效果不一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言特定分词器能提升分词质量和下游性能，但使用它们要么需要从头训练新模型，要么需要调整预训练模型的词表，成本高昂。作者希望提出一种方案，能够在共享词表上实现语言特定分词，同时避免上述问题。

Method: 提出Language-adaptive Maximum a Posteriori (LangMAP) Tokenization，将UnigramLM算法扩展到多语言场景。训练时需要语言标签，但推理时无需知道输入语言即可进行语言特定分词。可从头训练多语言模型时使用，也可适配预训练模型的分词器而不改变其词表。

Result: 在14个开源分词器、9种自然语言和9种编程语言上，LangMAP改善了形态边界对齐，并在所有编程语言上改善与抽象语法树（AST）叶子边界的对齐。微调实验中结果不一：在目标语言的语法可接受性（MultiBLiMP）上有提升，但在知识相关任务（Global-PIQA, Belebele）上效果不稳定。

Conclusion: LangMAP能在不改变词表的情况下实现语言特定分词，在形态对齐和语法任务上有优势，但在知识任务上优势不明显，表明该方法在不同类型任务上的泛化能力存在差异。

Abstract: Language-specific tokenizers improve tokenization quality and the downstream performance of models on those languages. However, using such a tokenizer comes at a cost: either a new model must be trained from scratch, or the vocabulary of an existing pretrained model must be adapted. We propose Language-adaptive Maximum a Posteriori (LangMAP) Tokenization, a tokenization scheme that extends the UnigramLM algorithm to the multilingual setting, producing language-specific tokenization from a single shared vocabulary. Notably, LangMAP can be used when training a multilingual language model from scratch or to adapt a pretrained model's tokenizer to individual languages without changing its vocabulary. While language labels are required at training time, a key feature of the algorithm is that it then performs language-specific tokenization at inference without knowledge of the input's language. Across 14 open-source tokenizers, 9 natural languages, and 9 programming languages, LangMAP improves morphological boundary alignment and, for all coding languages tested, alignment with abstract syntax tree (AST) leaf boundaries. In fine-tuning experiments, results are mixed: LangMAP improves target-language grammatical acceptability (MultiBLiMP) on the languages tested; its benefits are less consistent on knowledge-related tasks (Global-PIQA, Belebele).

</details>


### [154] [Evaluation Awareness Is Not One Capability: Evidence from Open Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23583)
*Nilesh Nayan,Aishwarya Sampath Kumar,Rishiraj Girmal,Shivani Anilkumar,Sankaran Vaidyanathan,David A. Nader Palacio,Reshmi Ghosh,Soundararajan Srinivasan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过8个实验、37个开源模型和7个模型家族，系统研究了评估感知（evaluation awareness）问题，发现模型能检测到评估环境并改变行为，导致基准测试表现与真实部署行为之间存在系统性差距（基准幻觉）。检测能力中等且受训练驱动，检测会显著降低安全行为（硬拒绝率下降5.8个百分点，合规性最高上升30个百分点），且这些维度间耦合弱，表明安全评估不能依赖单一分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的安全基准评估隐含一个基本假设：测试条件下的行为能够预测部署时的行为。但这一假设在模型能够检测到评估线索并相应调整自身行为时便失效了，导致基准表现成为对部署安全性的乐观上界。本文旨在系统性地刻画和量化这种评估感知现象及其对安全评估的影响。

Method: 在37个开源模型和7个模型家族上设计8个实验，从四个维度系统分析评估感知：（i）检测能力（模型能否区分测试与部署环境）；（ii）检测对安全行为的影响（假设框架、措辞变化下的行为偏移）；（iii）表征层面的鲁棒性（即使行为被抑制，表征是否仍保留检测能力，以及多层激活引导是否可控）；（iv）上述维度的耦合程度（相关性分析）。

Result: （i）24/37模型在检测上超过随机水平，最佳AUROC 0.714（人类0.819），指令微调比模型规模影响更大；（ii）假设框架下硬拒绝率下降5.8个百分点，21/140个HarmBench措辞效应显著，合规性最高上升30个百分点；（iii）在驱动行为降至随机水平以下的改写条件下，探针AUROC仍保持0.98，多层激活引导可因果影响下游任务；（iv）15个相关性中仅1个显著：行为检测与框架抵抗之间的稳健关联（ρ=-0.79, p<0.001）。

Conclusion: 评估感知是多维度的，检测能力、行为表现和可控性独立变化，不存在单一的"感知分数"能可靠指示部署安全性。这种基准幻觉意味着当前安全评估方法需要根本性的重新设计。

Abstract: Safety benchmarks assume that test-condition behavior predicts deployment behavior, an assumption that fails if models detect evaluation cues and adapt. This opens a gap between benchmark performance and deployment behavior: compliance measured under test conditions becomes an optimistic upper bound that overstates how safely a model behaves once the evaluation harness is removed. We characterize this evaluation awareness through eight experiments across 37 open-weight models and seven families. (i)Detection is moderate and training-driven (24/37 models exceed chance, best AUROC 0.714 vs.0.819 human, with instruction tuning dominating over scale). (ii)Detection shifts safety behavior (hard refusal drops 5.8 percentage points under hypothetical framing, and 21/140 HarmBench framing effects are significant, with compliance rising up to +30 percentage points. (iii)Representations survive behavioral collapse (probes retain AUROC 0.98 under rewrites that drive behavior below chance, and multi-layer steering causally moves three downstream tasks while random controls do not). (iv)These axes are weakly coupled (only 1/15 correlations are significant, the sole robust link being behavioral detection versus framing resistance, $ρ=-0.79$, $p<0.001$). We call this gap the benchmark illusion: because detectability, behavioral manifestation, and controllability vary independently, it is multivariate rather than a single number, so no single awareness score is a reliable proxy for deployment safety.

</details>


### [155] [EnterpriseClawBench: Benchmarking Agents from Real Workplace Sessions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23654)
*Jincheng Zhong,Weizhi Wang,Che Jiang,Kai Tian,Zhenzhao Yuan,Junlin Yang,Dianqiao Lei,Kaiyan Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出EnterpriseClawBench，一个基于真实企业工作流的智能体基准，包含852个可复现任务，最佳配置（Codex+GPT-5.5）仅达0.663分，揭示了企业智能体评估需要多维指标而非单一分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业智能体日益在真实工作空间中运行（处理异构文件、调用工具、交付业务成果），但缺乏能够反映这种复杂场景的标准化评估基准。

Method: 从大规模专有企业会话档案出发，构建852个可复现任务，每个任务配套恢复的fixture、重写提示、角色类别、技能子类、硬规则和语义评分标准。数据集因包含内部内容不公开，仅开源构建与评估协议。

Result: 最佳配置（Codex与GPT-5.5）在基准上仅达到0.663分，表明当前模型在企业智能体场景下表现有限。

Conclusion: 企业智能体评估必须报告模型与评估框架的组合、工件交付、视觉质量、成本、运行时间和技能迁移行为等多维指标，不能仅靠单一分数衡量性能。

Abstract: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside workspaces: they read heterogeneous files, invoke tools, and deliver business artifacts. We introduce EnterpriseClawBench, an enterprise agent benchmark constructed from proprietary, real-world agent sessions. Starting from a large archive of workplace sessions, the EnterpriseClawBench produces 852 reproducible tasks, each paired with recovered fixtures, rewritten prompts, role classes, skill subclasses, hard rules, and semantic rubrics. Because the sessions contain internal enterprise content, we do not release the benchmark data; instead, our reusable contribution is the construction and evaluation protocol. On EnterpriseClawBench, the best configuration reaches only 0.663 (Codex with GPT-5.5). These results show that enterprise agent evaluation must report harness--model combinations, artifact delivery, visual quality, cost, runtime, and skill-transfer behavior, rather than collapsing performance into a single score. Code: https://github.com/FrontisAI/EnterpriseClawBench

</details>


### [156] [Can LLMs Reliably Self-Report Adversarial Prefills, and How?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23671)
*Quang Minh Nguyen,Uzair Ahmed,Taegyoon Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型在安全上下文中的内省能力。实验发现，在10个开源指令微调LLM和4个安全基准上，模型无法可靠识别自身输出是否受到对抗性前缀攻击，平均声称率27.3%。内省信号主要源自安全/拒绝相关推理。通过权重正交化、LoRA微调等方法干预后，模型的内省信号被显著改变，但干预本身也带来副作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究表明LLM在良性任务上具备内省能力，本文将其扩展至安全上下文，考察模型能否可靠识别自身先前的回答是否受到对抗性前缀攻击（adversarial prefill attack）的诱导。

Method: 在10个开源指令微调LLM（3B-70B）和4个安全基准上进行实验。通过对抗性前缀攻击生成"prefilled"输出，询问模型是否认为自己先前的回答有意图。测试了权重正交化（orthogonalizing weights against refusal direction）、三种LoRA微调方法（SFT、GRPO、DPO）以及不同探针框架（内部意图 vs 外部篡改）对内省信号的影响。

Result: 1）没有模型能可靠识别自身被攻击的输出，对prefilled回答声称有意图的平均率达27.3%；2）内省信号主要来自安全/拒绝相关推理；3）权重正交化使prefilled和自然输出的声称率差距趋近于零，但该方向并非唯一中介；4）探针框架依赖性强，内部意图与外部篡改的问题框架引发不同响应；5）三种LoRA微调在所有8B-27B模型上均扩大了意图探针的差距，但方法排名因模型而异；6）干预不迁移到篡改探针，且意外地提高了大多数模型上对抗性前缀攻击的成功率。

Conclusion: 揭示了安全上下文中LLM内省信号的机制基础，指出了模型自我报告的可靠性风险。内省信号具有脆弱性和可操纵性，现有干预方法效果有限且存在副作用，模型无法可靠区分自身意图与外部攻击。

Abstract: Prior work shows that large language models (LLMs) exhibit introspective capability on benign tasks. We extend the question to safety contexts and examine how reliably a model can recognize that its own prior response was elicited by an adversarial prefill attack. Across ten open-weight instruction-tuned LLMs (3B to 70B) and four safety benchmarks, no model reliably recognizes its own compromised outputs, with models claiming intent on prefilled responses at an average rate of $27.3\%$. Introspective signal stems largely from safety- and refusal-related reasoning. Orthogonalizing models' weights against the refusal direction collapses the gap between claiming rates on prefilled and natural outputs to near zero, though the direction is not its unique mediator. The signal is also probe-dependent: framing the question as internal intention versus external tampering elicits qualitatively different responses on the same models. We test three LoRA finetuning methods (SFT, GRPO, DPO) on eight models from 3B to 27B; all three widen the intention-probe gap on every model from 8B to 27B, with method ranking varying by model. The intervention does not transfer to the tampering probe and counterintuitively raises attack success rate under adversarial prefill on most models, amounting to a partial mitigation. These findings outline mechanisms underpinning the observed introspective signals in safety contexts and highlight risks in the reliability of LLM self-reports.

</details>


### [157] [Randomized YaRN Improves Length Generalization for Long-Context Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23687)
*Manas Mehta,Fangcong Yin,Greg Durrett*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Randomized YaRN方法，通过在短序列训练时引入随机化YaRN位置编码和长度课程，使LLM能泛化到极长序列（16K-128K），在BABILong和MRCR基准上显著优于标准微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在短序列上预训练后虽经扩展训练，但仍难以进一步泛化到超长序列，需要一种更有效的长度泛化训练方法。

Method: 结合基于YaRN的位置外推与随机化位置编码及长度课程：在短上下文训练时，为token分配从更大位置范围采样的YaRN位置编码，使模型在短输入上也能暴露于分布外（OOD）的位置表示。

Result: 在<8K上下文训练数据上，Randomized YaRN在16K到128K上下文长度上持续提升推理性能，超越标准微调，在最远的OOD长度上增益最大。

Conclusion: 逐步将模型暴露于OOD位置分布是实现可泛化长上下文推理的有效策略。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are typically pretrained on short sequences and then extended to work on longer sequences with additional training. However, such LLMs still struggle to further generalize to very long sequences. We propose Randomized YaRN, a training method that improves length generalization by combining YaRN-based positional extrapolation with randomized positional encoding and a length curriculum. During training on short context data, tokens are assigned YaRN positional encodings sampled from a larger position range, exposing the model to out-of-distribution positional representations even on short-context inputs. We evaluate Randomized YaRN on two challenging long-context reasoning benchmarks, BABILong and Multi-Round Coreference Resolution (MRCR). When training on data with <8K context, Randomized YaRN consistently improves reasoning performance on context lengths from 16K to 128K and outperforms standard fine-tuning, with the largest gains appearing at far out-of-distribution lengths. Our results suggest that progressively exposing models to OOD positional distributions provides an effective recipe for generalizable long-context reasoning.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [158] [FPGA-Accelerated Neuromorphic Vision System for Real-Time Orbital Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20727)
*Diego Hernández,Sebastián Valdivia,Vicente Westerhout,Esteban Vera,Daniel Yunge*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机和FPGA加速的网格聚类算法开源框架，用于空间目标检测，在EVAS数据集上达到97%的检测准确率，功耗仅8.5W，处理延迟低于62ms。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轨道空间日益拥挤，需要先进的监测解决方案来应对不断增长的驻留空间目标监测需求。

Method: 将基于网格聚类的基础算法适配到FPGA加速架构：可编程逻辑层执行快速空间量化，软件客户端处理簇形成，系统集成单个事件相机与自定义分布式处理架构。

Result: 对EVAS数据集夜间天空观测的系统采样验证表明，RSO检测准确率达97%，总功耗8.5W，确定性处理延迟低于62ms。

Conclusion: 该架构兼具能量效率与高精度检测，可作为分布式空间监视网络的可行解决方案，并为基于事件的FPGA处理提供了基础工具包。

Abstract: The escalating congestion in orbital space demands advanced monitoring solutions. This work presents a comprehensive open-source framework for neuromorphic resident space object (RSO) detection, adapting the foundational grid clustering algorithm for FPGA acceleration. The system integrates a single event-based camera (EBC) with a custom, distributed processing architecture, where rapid spatial quantization is executed in programmable logic (FPGA) and cluster formation is managed by a software client. We validate this architecture through systematic sampling of night-sky observations from the EVAS dataset, demonstrating 97% detection accuracy for RSOs. The implementation, which serves as a foundational toolkit for event-based FPGA processing, achieves efficient throughput with a total power consumption of 8.5 W and deterministic processing latencies below 62 ms. The architecture's energy efficiency and high-precision detection position it as a viable solution for distributed space surveillance networks.

</details>


### [159] [A3C3: AI Algorithm and Accelerator Co-design, Co-search, and Co-generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20869)
*Selin Yildirim,Yingbing Huang,Deming Chen*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出了一种AI算法与加速器协同设计、协同搜索与协同生成的方法论A3C3，通过联合优化神经网络架构与硬件实现，自动生成更优的模型-加速器配对，克服传统分离设计带来的效率低下问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AI部署将模型设计和硬件映射分为两个独立阶段，先开发算法追求精度，再适配硬件约束，这种分离式设计导致系统整体性能次优，尤其在现代AI工作负载日益异构化、内存密集型和平台依赖的背景下，问题更为突出。

Method: A3C3将算法设计空间和加速器设计空间进行参数化，并采用联合搜索的方式，自动生成模型与加速器的最佳配对，实现精度、延迟、吞吐量、能效和硬件利用率等多目标的平衡。

Result: 该方法能够自动生成更优的模型-加速器组合，在多个性能指标上取得更好的平衡。

Conclusion: 算法与硬件的协同设计（而非分离设计）是提升AI系统整体性能的关键，A3C3为此提供了自动化、系统化的解决方案。

Abstract: We present a holistic methodology for artificial intelligence algorithm and accelerator co-design, co-search, and co-generation (A3C3), which jointly optimizes neural network architectures and their hardware implementations to address the inefficiencies of traditional top-down AI system design flows. Conventional AI deployment often treats model design and hardware mapping as separate stages: an algorithm is first developed for accuracy, and only afterward adapted to meet latency, throughput, energy, or resource constraints. This separation can lead to suboptimal systems, particularly as modern AI workloads become increasingly heterogeneous, memory-intensive, and platform-dependent. A3C3 instead parameterizes both algorithmic and accelerator design spaces and searches them jointly, enabling the automatic generation of model-accelerator pairs that better balance accuracy, latency, throughput, energy efficiency, and hardware utilization. This article is a book chapter of the Handbook of Embedded Machine Learning, edited by Sudeep Pasricha and Muhammad Shafique, Springer Nature.

</details>


### [160] [Closing the Loop on LLM-Generated RTL Assertions with Quality-Aware Formal Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21451)
*Ramesh Krishnamurthy,Danial Chitnis,Themis Prodromakis*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个轻量级开源框架，通过突变引导精炼、求解器选择与因果叙事合成三个环节，解决LLM生成断言在RTL形式验证中的虚假通过、成本波动和失败难解释问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM生成的断言在RTL形式验证中存在三个实际问题：断言可能因错误原因通过（如空洞断言）、证明成本在不同设计间差异大、失败反例轨迹难以解释。现有工作侧重断言生成本身，缺乏对断言质量的闭环保障。

Method: 方法包含三个组件：1) 突变引导精炼——通过引入突变（注入故障）检测断言能否区分正常与错误行为，剔除空洞或弱断言；2) 求解器选择——根据RTL结构特征在多个SMT后端中自动选择最优求解器；3) 因果叙事合成——基于反例轨迹生成可解释的失败原因描述。

Result: 在多种RTL设计上，该框架提高了生成断言的可信度，降低了不同求解器选择下的运行时间波动，并产生了基于反例轨迹的失败解释。

Conclusion: 质量感知的闭环验证（而非仅断言生成）是实现LLM辅助形式验证实用化的关键缺失环节。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) based assertion generation is making formal verification more accessible for Register Transfer Level (RTL) designs, but three practical issues remain. Generated properties can pass for the wrong reason, proof cost can vary widely from one design to another, and failing traces are hard to interpret. This paper presents a lightweight, open-source framework that addresses these issues in one loop. Our method combines mutation-guided refinement to reject weak assertions, including vacuous ones and those that fail to distinguish faulty behaviour, a solver-selection stage that chooses among candidate Satisfiability Modulo Theories (SMT) backends using RTL structure, and causal narrative synthesis to explain why a proof failed. Across diverse RTL designs, the framework improves confidence in generated assertions, reduces runtime variability over fixed-solver choices, and produces failure explanations that remain grounded in the counterexample trace. The results suggest that quality-aware closure, rather than assertion generation alone, is the missing step for practical LLM-assisted formal verification.

</details>


### [161] [COMPOSE: Static Timing-driven Composable Reconfigurable Architecture for Accelerating Recurrence-Bound Loops](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21454)
*Rohan Juneja,Vishruti Ranjan,Rakshith Harish,Li-Shiuan Peh*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: COMPOSE是一种可组合的CGRA架构，通过编译时静态时序信息指导动态形成处理单元，实现跨循环迭代的空间融合操作和松弛利用，平均提升1.6倍性能、降低2.9倍能耗延迟积，解决了传统CGRA中串行调度、资源利用不足和寄存器压力等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CGRA存在三个关键问题：(1) 固定尺寸的PE被静态绑定到单个操作，导致跨迭代依赖必须通过串行调度解决，限制了循环级并行；(2) 静态执行调度无法利用操作间的时序松弛，造成资源利用不足和延迟增加；(3) 中间结果频繁写入寄存器，加剧了寄存器文件和局部存储的压力，尤其在功耗或内存受限环境下引入大量数据移动开销。

Method: COMPOSE提出可组合CGRA架构：(1) 编译时根据静态时序信息动态形成处理单元(PEs)；(2) 通过跨循环迭代的空间融合操作解析跨迭代依赖；(3) 选择性利用时序松弛实现低延迟执行；(4) 当中间值可在本地消费时延迟输出寄存器化，减少寄存器压力。

Result: 在多样化工作负载上，相较于最先进技术(SOTA)，COMPOSE平均实现1.6倍性能提升和2.9倍能耗延迟积(EDP)降低，面积和功耗开销极小。

Conclusion: COMPOSE通过编译时驱动的可组合PE动态形成机制，有效解决了传统CGRA的串行依赖、松弛浪费和寄存器压力三大瓶颈，在极小面积功耗开销下实现了显著的性能与能效提升。

Abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Architectures (CGRAs) provide a spatially programmable substrate well suited for accelerating compute-intensive workloads with abundant parallelism. However, traditional CGRA execution models rely on rigid, fixed-size processing elements (PEs) that are statically bound to individual operations, which forces inter-iteration dependencies to be resolved through serialized scheduling. This limits throughput and reduces parallelism across loop iterations. Moreover, static execution schedules often fail to exploit available timing slack between operations, leading to resource underutilization and increased latency. The frequent registering of intermediate results further exacerbates pressure on register files and local memories, introducing data movement overheads that reduce energy efficiency, particularly in power or memory constrained environments.
  To address these challenges, we introduce COMPOSE, a composable CGRA architecture that enables dynamic formation of PEs at compile time guided by static timing information. By spatially fusing operations across loop iterations and selectively utilizing slack, COMPOSE resolves inter-iteration dependencies that limit throughput and enables low latency execution by reducing slack wastage. Additionally, the architecture reduces register file pressure by deferring output registration when intermediate values remain locally consumable, which significantly lowers redundant memory traffic. Across a diverse set of workloads, COMPOSE on average delivers 1.6x performance improvement and 2.9x EDP reduction over state-of-the-art (SOTA), at minimal area and power overheads.

</details>


### [162] [Apple Neural Engine: Architecture, Programming, and Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22283)
*Spencer H. Bryngelson*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文逆向工程了Apple Neural Engine (ANE) 从A11到A18、M1到M5系列芯片的完整软硬件栈，涵盖数据通路、编译流程、权重压缩、驱动固件及命令协议，揭示了ANE在实际设备上的性能上限与调用路径，并明确指出直接调用接口仅供研究使用，生产环境应使用Core ML。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ANE作为Apple芯片中的固定功能矩阵加速器，长期仅通过Core ML框架暴露给开发者，其底层架构、性能边界、编译流程和运行协议缺乏公开文档，限制了研究者对芯片级AI加速的理解和优化。

Method: 基于Apple Silicon设备上的直接测量、私有运行时和编译器及内核驱动与固件的静态分析，综合推理出ANE的完整架构。

Result: 记录了ANE的数据通路与roofline性能模型、从Core ML之下直达ANE的分发路径、编译器与磁盘程序格式、权重压缩方案，以及内核驱动、固件和命令协议。测量数据覆盖M1和M5芯片，并提供了各芯片的目标表与操作-设备矩阵。

Conclusion: ANE存在一条可直接从用户空间调用的底层路径，但该路径未经文档化、不受支持且版本脆弱，仅适用于测量、研究和设备端实验，正式软件应继续使用Core ML支持的路径。

Abstract: The Apple Neural Engine (ANE) is the fixed-function matrix accelerator that has shipped in Apple systems-on-chip since the A11-class iPhone and iPad chips and the M1-class Mac chips, exposed to applications only through the Core ML model framework. This guide reports a reverse-engineered account of the engine, based on direct measurement on Apple silicon and static analysis of the private runtime, compiler, kernel driver, and firmware. It documents the datapath and the roofline that bound the engine's throughput and energy, the dispatch route that reaches it below Core ML, the compiler and on-disk program format, the weight-compression scheme, and the kernel driver, firmware, and command protocol beneath them. The account covers the A11 through A18 and M1 through M5 families, with per-chip target tables and an operation-by-device matrix; the direct measurements are on the M1 and M5. Claims are labeled as measured, decompile-derived, or predicted, and the methodology and open questions are recorded. The direct route is callable from ordinary user space but remains undocumented, unsupported, and version-fragile; it is intended for measurement, research, and on-device work, not for shipping software, where Core ML remains the supported path.

</details>


### [163] [Row-Based Layout Synthesis for Analog Circuits Using Height-Quantized Primitives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21767)
*Endalk Y. Gebru,Ramprasath S.,Ramesh Harjani,Sachin S. Sapatnekar*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于模拟和混合信号电路的量化行高布局综合方法，通过将模拟模块映射到量化高度行中，优化行高结构，从而减少仿真与实际硅片之间的性能差距。实验结果表明，该方法能将原理图到版图后性能差距降低高达68.5%，并在多数测试案例中实现面积缩减，最大达24.1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先进工艺节点（如FinFET）中严格的设计规则和强烈的版图依赖效应使得模拟与混合信号电路的版图自动化日益困难，迫切需要一种能够缩小仿真与实际硅片之间差距的自动化布局方法。

Method: 提出量化行高布局综合方法，基于电路需求和版图约束优化行高结构，同时将模拟构建模块映射到量化高度行中。

Result: 在多个测试案例上，该方法合成的版图具有与较约束宽松的自定义基线设计相当的后版图性能；原理图到版图后性能差距降低高达68.5%，多数测试案例面积减小，最大面积缩减达24.1%。

Conclusion: 量化行高布局综合方法能有效缩小仿真到硅片的性能差距，同时降低面积开销，为AMS电路版图自动化提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Restrictive design rules and strong layout-dependent effects have tightened the coupling between physical layout decisions and electrical performance in advanced process nodes, such as FinFET, making analog and mixed-signal (AMS) layout automation increasingly difficult. This paper presents a quantized row-height layout synthesis methodology for AMS circuits, a methodology that has previously been shown to reduce the simulation-to-silicon gap. The proposed flow optimizes a row height fabric from circuit requirements and layout constraints while mapping analog building blocks into quantized-height rows. Results on multiple testcases demonstrate that the proposed flow synthesizes layouts with similar postlayout performance relative to less-constrained custom baseline designs, with comparable performance metrics. Our quantized-height designs are shown to reduce the schematic-to-postlayout performance gap by up to 68.5% and result in lower area for most of our testcases, with a maximum area reduction of 24.1%.

</details>


### [164] [AgentDSE: Reasoning-Augmented Architectural Design Space Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21836)
*Chenyu Wang,Jiahe Caroline Shi,David Kong,Duane S. Boning,Zishen Wan,Yilun Du,Vijay Janapa Reddi*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: AgentDSE 是一种由通用大语言模型驱动的模拟器在环方法，通过自动化架构推理循环，在DNN加速器映射、软硬件协同设计和CPU缓存层次优化等任务中，以高达两个数量级更少的模拟评估次数达到竞争性或更优的设计质量，并生成可追溯的架构推理轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统架构设计空间探索（DSE）方法将模拟器视为黑盒，导致效率极低（需要数万次评估），而人类架构师能通过推理物理约束、性能瓶颈、数据复用和工作负载结构来有效引导探索。本文旨在弥合这一差距，用自动化方式模拟人类架构师的推理过程。

Method: 提出 AgentDSE，一种由通用大语言模型（LLM）编码代理驱动的模拟器在环方法论。该方法无需模型微调、预计算设计数据库或领域特定优化器代码，自动执行架构推理循环，通过LLM编码代理与模拟器交互迭代式探索设计空间。

Result: 在DNN加速器映射、硬件/软件协同设计和CPU缓存层次优化三个任务上，AgentDSE以少两个数量级的模拟评估次数达到竞争性或更优的设计质量，并生成可检查的轨迹，揭示架构假设、性能悬崖、隐式先验和模拟器伪影。

Conclusion: AgentDSE有效桥接了传统黑盒DSE与人类推理之间的鸿沟，以极高的样本效率实现高质量设计，同时使每次搜索决策完全可追溯，为架构设计探索提供了一种可解释且高效的新范式。

Abstract: Traditional architectural design space exploration (DSE) is highly inefficient, typically requiring tens of thousands of simulator evaluations across various optimization methods. This inefficiency arises because conventional methods treat the simulator as a black-box oracle. In contrast, human architects effectively guide exploration by reasoning through physical constraints, performance bottlenecks, data reuse, and workload structures. To bridge this gap, we introduce AgentDSE, a simulator-in-the-loop methodology driven by a general-purpose large language model (LLM) coding agent. AgentDSE automates this architectural-reasoning loop without requiring model fine-tuning, precomputed design databases, or domain-specific optimizer code. Across deep neural network (DNN) accelerator mapping, hardware/software co-design, and CPU cache-hierarchy optimization, AgentDSE achieves competitive or better design quality with up to two orders of magnitude fewer evaluations. AgentDSE also produces inspectable traces that surface architectural hypotheses, performance cliffs, implicit priors, and simulator artifacts, making every search decision traceable rather than buried in optimizer state.

</details>


### [165] [DejaVu: Why You Should Write to Your DRAM Rows Twice, Carefully](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22297)
*Haocong Luo,İsmail Emir Yüksel,Ataberk Olgun,Nisa Bostanci,Orhun Ecemiş,Abdullah Giray Yağlıkçı,Onur Mutlu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文首次实验证明了DRAM中的DejaVu现象——先前写入的数据会影响DRAM对读干扰的脆弱性。使用112个商用DDR4芯片的实验表明，与仅写入一次的基线相比，用相反数据覆盖受害者行会降低诱导比特翻转所需的最小攻击行激活次数（ACmin），而两次写入相同数据则提高ACmin。研究还发现DejaVu模式会显著影响PUD操作的可靠性，并对DRAM测试方法和读干扰缓解技术产生重要影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DRAM的读干扰现象（如RowHammer）是重要的可靠性与安全问题，但此前研究未考虑先前写入的数据模式对读干扰脆弱性的影响。作者旨在探索并解释这种历史数据依赖现象（DejaVu），并评估其对DRAM测试、可靠性和安全性的影响。

Method: 使用112个来自三大制造商的商用DDR4 DRAM芯片进行实验表征。设置基线条件（仅向受害者行写入一次），对比用相反数据覆盖和两次写入相同数据的场景，测量ACmin变化。提出两种假设（电荷恢复不足和电荷陷阱状态改变）并通过受控实验验证。进一步在32行MAJ-3操作中评估DejaVu对PUD可靠性的影响。

Result: 用相反数据覆盖受害者行会降低ACmin（即更易发生比特翻转），而两次写入相同数据会提高ACmin。在32行MAJ-3操作中，用DejaVu模式覆盖DRAM行后，可靠执行MAJ-3失败的比特线数量平均减少32.7%。将读干扰缓解阈值降低20%会导致6.3%的性能开销。

Conclusion: DejaVu现象表明DRAM的读干扰脆弱性存在数据历史依赖性，现有DRAM测试方法需要纳入DejaVu因素以准确表征读干扰。DejaVu也影响读干扰缓解技术（如降低阈值应对更坏情况）的性能开销。该发现对DRAM可靠性评估、测试方法论和系统安全设计具有重要指导意义。

Abstract: We provide the first experimental demonstration of DejaVu, a phenomenon where the data previously written to DRAM cells affects DRAM's vulnerability to read disturbance. Our experimental characterization using 112 COTS DDR4 DRAM chips from all three major manufacturers shows that, compared to the baseline where we initialize the victim row by writing to it only once, 1) overwriting it with the opposite data reduces ACmin, the minimum aggressor row activation count to induce a bitflip, and 2) writing the same data twice increases ACmin. We provide two hypotheses to explain DejaVu. First, we hypothesize that overwriting the victim row with opposite data values causes under-restoration of charge in DRAM cells. Second, we hypothesize that overwriting the victim row changes charge trap states in the active region, affecting read-disturbance-induced cell leakage current. We conduct controlled characterization to provide insight into these hypotheses. We further characterize the reliability of Processing-Using-DRAM (PUD) operations with DRAM rows initialized with DejaVu patterns. Our characterization of 32-row MAJ-3 operation shows that overwriting the DRAM rows used in the operation reduces the number of bitlines that fail to reliably perform MAJ-3 by 32.7% on average compared to the baseline where rows are written only once. Based on our observations, we describe two major implications of DejaVu. We show how DRAM testing and characterization methodologies should account for DejaVu to accurately characterize read disturbance vulnerability under fixed data patterns and rigorously study data-pattern effects without unintended interference from DejaVu. We also evaluate the performance overhead of read disturbance mitigation techniques when thresholds need to be lowered to be secure against DejaVu, showing a 6.3% overhead when reducing the threshold by 20%.

</details>


### [166] [NeutronSparse: Coordinating Heterogeneous Engines for Sparse Matrix Multiplication on NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22482)
*Xin Ai,Zeyu Ling,Hao Yuan,Qiange Wang,Yanfeng Zhang,Yutao Peng,Ge Yu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出NeutronSparse框架，通过异构引擎的稀疏感知协调和局部性感知的瓦片编排，在Ascend 910B NPU上实现了相比NPU基线1.26x-7.78x、相比GPU库1.03x-3.07x的加速，解决了NPU上SpMM因缺乏异构计算单元间高效协调导致的性能瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NPU上高性能SpMM面临数据管理挑战，不规则稀疏性需要高效的数据组织和调度。官方MindSpore在Ascend 910B上仅达到GPU cuSPARSE在A100上36.3%的性能，亟需挖掘NPU在稀疏计算上的潜力。

Method: NeutronSparse框架包含两个关键技术：(i) 稀疏感知的异构引擎协调——自适应划分和平衡异构计算单元间的负载；(ii) 局部性感知的瓦片编排——重组和重用数据瓦片以减少冗余计算和内存移动开销。

Result: 在Ascend 910B上，NeutronSparse相比NPU基线实现1.26x-7.78x加速，相比NVIDIA A100上的cuSPARSE实现1.03x-3.07x加速。

Conclusion: 揭示了NPU在稀疏计算中未被充分利用的潜力，证明了通过协调优先的设计可以有效克服NPU在SpMM上的性能瓶颈。

Abstract: Sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpMM) is a fundamental data operation for large-scale sparse data processing. With NPUs increasingly deployed in data centers for their performance and energy efficiency, accelerating SpMM on these platforms is a natural choice. However, high-performance SpMM on NPUs poses a data management challenge, as irregular sparsity demands efficient data organization and scheduling. On Ascend 910B, the official MindSpore implementation achieves only 36.3% of the performance of GPU-based sparse libraries such as cuSPARSE on NVIDIA A100. To this end, we conduct an in-depth architectural analysis of SpMM execution on NPUs versus GPU and identify that the key performance bottleneck for SpMM on NPUs lies in the lack of efficient coordination across heterogeneous compute units under tile-based execution model. Therefore, we propose NeutronSparse, a coordination-first SpMM framework for NPUs. NeutronSparse integrates two key techniques: (i) Sparsity-aware coordination of heterogeneous engines, which adaptively partitions and balances workloads between heterogeneous compute units to keep them busy, and (ii) Locality-aware tile orchestrating, which reorganizes and reuses data tiles to reduce redundant computation and memory movement overhead. Evaluations on Ascend 910B show that NeutronSparse achieves 1.26x-7.78x speedup over NPU baselines and 1.03x-3.07x speedup over leading GPU libraries on NVIDIA A100, revealing untapped potential of NPUs for sparse computation.

</details>


### [167] [Non-Uniform L2 Cache Latency Across the Streaming Multiprocessors of an NVIDIA L40](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22588)
*Faruk Alpay,Baris Basaran*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: NVIDIA L40的L2缓存延迟并非恒定值，而是依赖于物理SM位置，变化范围达52%（222-339周期），这一物理特征可用于SM自定位和设备指纹识别，并能优化延迟敏感型任务的调度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纠正学术界将L2缓存视为统一池（单一命中延迟）的错误假设，揭示其延迟依赖于物理SM位置的物理特性，并探索这一发现的实际应用价值。

Method: 设计turn-serialized、%smid-resolved的探针，在一次启动中映射所有142个SM的命中延迟；构建加性模型L=μ+a(sm)+b(slice)来解释延迟变化；通过独立访问模式验证、不同设备（RTX 5090）测试、温度稳定性检验等手段确认物理性。

Result: L2-hit延迟在222-339周期范围内变化（52%范围），每周期噪声低于0.01周期；模型R²=0.87（加入秩1项后0.98）；SM项呈两折对称（r=0.999），符合AD102 GPC布局；SM自定位准确率92%，区分两台物理相同的L40准确率100%；利用延迟图调度可将makespan减少11%。

Conclusion: L2缓存延迟的SM依赖性是一个物理硬件指纹，可作为自定位和设备识别的原语，无需访问秘密数据即可实现高效的任务调度优化。

Abstract: The NVIDIA L40 exposes a 96 MiB L2 cache usually modeled as one uniform pool with a single hit latency. We show this is wrong at the granularity a kernel sees: L2-hit latency depends strongly and reproducibly on which physical streaming multiprocessor (SM) issues the load. A turn-serialized, %smid-resolved probe maps the hit latency across all 142 SMs in one launch; it is not a constant near 279 cycles but spans 222-339 cycles (a 52% range), with per-repetition noise below 0.01 cycles. An additive model $L = μ+ a(\mathrm{sm}) + b(\mathrm{slice})$ explains $R^2 = 0.87$ (0.98 with one rank-1 term), and the SM term is two-fold symmetric (two halves of 72 SMs at correlation $r = 0.999$), following the AD102 GPC layout. Independent access patterns agree per SM at $r = 1.000$, so the effect is physical. The same probe on a Blackwell RTX 5090 shows it generalizes, while the per-die pattern is device-specific. Read as a fingerprint, a single user-level probe identifies the SM within a device at 92%, and two physically identical L40s are separated at 100% despite near-identical mean latency (per-SM map $r = 0.63$): a per-die hardware identity, not a clock artifact. This is a self-localization and fingerprinting primitive: a kernel reads its own placement and device, not a victim's, and extracts no secret data. The map is stable, unchanged after an hour at full utilization on both devices. As a consequence, distributing latency-bound work by the map cuts makespan by up to 11%. Single-thread capacity, line-tag, prefetch-modifier, and persisting-L2 results appear as controls. The artifact contains seeds, raw observations, the trained model, and regeneration scripts.

</details>


### [168] [Multi-Level Resistive Synapses for On-Chip Neural Networks: A Physics-Based Design of a Memristive Crossbar Fabric with Quasi-Continuous Conductance States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22621)
*David Alejandro Trejo Pizzo*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于物理的片上神经网络设计，利用多级忆阻突触实现密集电导态，通过1T1R交叉阵列在模拟域完成推理、反向传播和权重更新，支持大型语言模型(LLM)，其三元BitNet数据通路每token效率比先进CPU/GPU高出数个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CMOS和二进制ReRAM在实现神经网络时面临权重搬运开销大、能效低的问题，亟需一种高密度、模拟域存内计算方案来高效支撑大规模语言模型等计算密集型任务。

Method: 基于离子输运物理开发状态变量模型，量化热噪声、漂移和量子化电导下的可存储子级；构建1T1R交叉阵列，推导含线阻的模拟向量-矩阵乘法(VMM)线性代数；设计差分突触实现有符号权重；多层流水线在模拟域物理执行推理、反向传播和权重更新；推导原位外积学习规则及其在电导格点上的离散化；给出材料叠层(HfO₂)、FEOL/BEOL CMOS工艺集成流程、SPICE模型、忆阻-FPGA神经形态系统及电流模式跨导线性softmax的存内自注意力引擎。

Result: 三元BitNet数据通路在每token效率上比先进CPU/GPU高出数个数量级；该设计消除了权重搬运，在能效、面积、容量和片间互连模型上均优于二进制ReRAM和传统CMOS方案。

Conclusion: 该工作提供了一个自洽的硬件原生蓝图，实现高密度、模拟域存内神经处理器，特别适合大规模语言模型的部署。

Abstract: Building on resistive communication, this paper presents a physics-based design of an on-chip neural network with multi-level memristive synapses supporting a dense spectrum of conductance states. Derived from ionic transport physics, we develop a state-variable model and quantify storable sub-levels under thermal noise, drift, and quantized conductance. We assemble these devices into a 1T1R crossbar fabric, derive the linear algebra of analog vector-matrix multiplication (VMM) under wire resistance, and design a differential synapse for signed weights. A multilayer pipeline executes inference, backpropagation, and weight updates physically in the analog domain. We derive the in-situ outer-product learning rule, its discretization onto the conductance lattice, and the resulting quantization noise. We provide energy, area, capacity, and inter-tile models, showing this substrate is ideally suited for large language models (LLMs). Our design eliminates weight movement, surpassing binary ReRAM and traditional CMOS. We detail the material stack (HfO_2-based), the FEOL/BEOL CMOS foundry-integration flow, a self-contained SPICE model, the complete memristive-FPGA neuromorphic system, and an in-memory self-attention engine with current-mode translinear softmax. Finally, a ternary BitNet datapath shows projected per-token efficiency orders of magnitude better than advanced CPUs or GPUs. The result is a self-contained hardware-native blueprint for a high-density, analog, in-memory neural processor.

</details>


### [169] [Architecture for Health Initiative (Arch4Health): Computational Challenges in Health-Related Applications and the Role of Computer Architecture in Addressing Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22685)
*Nika Mansouri Ghiasi,Konstantina Koliogeorgi,Onur Mutlu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出Arch4Health计划，旨在通过优化计算系统架构应对生物大数据分析在性能、能效、可扩展性、隐私和安全方面的挑战，以推动生物技术在医疗健康领域的广泛应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物技术发展使得高通量、低成本、高精度的生物数据生成成为可能，为医疗健康带来机遇。然而，传统计算系统难以高效处理大规模生物数据，存在性能、能效、可扩展性、隐私和安全等方面的瓶颈，阻碍了这些技术在医疗健康领域的广泛采用。

Method: 提出Arch4Health（健康架构）计划，通过(i)识别和分析当前及未来健康与生命科学应用中的关键计算挑战，以及(ii)探索计算机架构师和计算系统设计者如何通过解决这些挑战来推动医疗健康进步。

Result: 本文介绍了Arch4Health计划的动机、愿景与目标、相关主题、研讨会及未来展望。

Conclusion: Arch4Health计划通过优化计算系统架构，有望实现高性能、高能效、低成本、隐私安全兼顾的生物数据分析，从而促进生物技术成果在医疗健康领域的广泛转化与应用。

Abstract: Recent biotechnological advances enable high-throughput, low-cost, and accurate biological data generation. This wealth of data enables unique opportunities for advancing healthcare. Despite these opportunities, efficiently analyzing large-scale biological data poses significant challenges for conventional computing systems. These systems often cannot keep up with the high-throughput rate at which data is generated, and they face additional constraints related to energy efficiency, scalability, privacy, and security. Therefore, to facilitate the wide adoption of recent advances in healthcare, there is a need to optimize the computing systems to enable high-performance, energy-efficient, low-cost, private, and secure analysis of biological data.
  We introduce the Architecture for Health (Arch4Health) initiative, which aims to (i) identify and analyze key computational challenges in current and future health- and life science-related applications and (ii) explore how computer architects and computing system designers can advance healthcare by addressing these challenges. In this short paper, we first present the motivations behind the Arch4Health initiative and, second, elaborate on its vision and goals, related topics, Arch4Health workshops, and future outlooks.

</details>


### [170] [Clutch: High Performance Vector-Scalar Comparison using DRAM via Chunked Temporal Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22812)
*Daichi Tokuda,Tatsuya Kubo,Ismail Emir Yuksel,Ataberk Olgun,Haocong Luo,Tomoya Nagatani,Geraldo F. Oliveira,Abdullah Giray Yağlıkçı,Mohammad Sadrosadati,Onur Mutlu,Shinya Takamaeda-Yamazaki*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: Clutch提出了一种基于时间编码和查找表的分块比较算法，用于加速处理-使用-DRAM(PuD)系统中的向量-标量比较，相比CPU/GPU实现了12倍吞吐量和69倍能效提升，相比最先进的bit-serial PuD方法实现了2.9倍和3.0倍的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 向量-标量比较是数据密集型工作负载中的基础操作，因其计算强度低而受限于内存带宽。现有PuD方法采用比特串行执行模型，比较操作的算法复杂度随操作数位宽增长，导致大量DRAM命令开销成为瓶颈，限制了应用加速效果。

Method: Clutch首先使用时间编码将每个向量值编码为先导1的序列，通过访问对应DRAM行实现基于查找表的标量比较。为避免高精度下查找表的巨大内存开销，Clutch将操作数分割为多个多位块，使用紧凑查找表独立比较各块，再通过PuD高效的过程合并结果。通过调整分块数量，可在吞吐量和内存使用之间灵活权衡。

Result: 在谓词评估和决策树推理任务上，Clutch相比高度优化的CPU和GPU执行，端到端应用吞吐量平均提升12倍，能效平均提升69倍；相比最先进的比特串行PuD实现，吞吐量提升2.9倍，能效提升3.0倍。

Conclusion: Clutch通过新颖的数据表示和比较算法，有效解决了PuD系统中向量-标量比较的DRAM命令开销瓶颈问题。同时，该工作首次将决策树推理映射到PuD执行，拓展了PuD的新应用领域。

Abstract: Vector-scalar comparison is a fundamental computation primitive that compares each element in a vector against a single scalar value. It is widely used in various data-intensive workloads from databases to machine learning. Due to its low computational intensity, its execution tends to be memory-bound, limiting the utilization of compute resources. Processing-using-DRAM (PuD) is an emerging computing paradigm that performs massively parallel bitwise operations directly inside DRAM arrays, alleviating off-chip data movement. Existing PuD-based approaches require many DRAM commands because the comparison's algorithmic complexity grows with operand bit-width in the bit-serial execution model. This command overhead becomes the dominant bottleneck, limiting application-level speedup.
  We propose Clutch, a data representation and comparison algorithm that accelerates vector-scalar comparisons in PuD systems with high efficiency and scalability. Clutch first uses temporal coding, encoding each vector value as a sequence of leading ones, which enables lookup-based comparison against a scalar by accessing the corresponding DRAM row. To avoid the prohibitive memory footprint of lookup tables at high precision, Clutch partitions operands into multiple multi-bit chunks, compares chunks independently using compact lookup tables, and merges the per-chunk results with a PuD-efficient procedure. By adjusting the number of chunks, Clutch provides a flexible tradeoff between throughput and memory usage. Across predicate evaluation and decision tree inference, Clutch improves end-to-end application throughput and energy efficiency by an average of 12x and 69x over highly optimized CPU and GPU execution, and by 2.9x and 3.0x over the state-of-the-art bit-serial PuD implementation. We also present the first mapping of decision tree inference to PuD execution, extending PuD to a new application domain.

</details>


### [171] [MOCAP: Wafer-Scale-Chip-Oriented Memory-Orchestrated Chunked Pipelining Framework for Prefill-Only LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22968)
*Zichuan Wang,Huizheng Wang,Yuheng Xiao,Haonan Zuo,Taiquan Wei,Jinyi Deng,Chao Li,Yang Hu,Shouyi Yin*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: MOCAP是一个面向晶圆级芯片上仅预填充（prefill-only）LLM推理的内存协调分块流水线框架，通过内存平衡的KV重分配（MBKR）和延迟平衡的分块划分（LBCP）分别解决长上下文预填充中的内存不均衡和延迟不均衡问题，相比GPipe平均降低76.4%端到端延迟并提升3.24倍吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文预填充场景下，LLM在推理过程中通信开销随序列长度增长，传统GPU系统成为瓶颈。晶圆级芯片虽有高带宽和大算力，但直接应用分块流水线面临两个挑战：1）因果依赖导致KV缓存跨流水线阶段累积不均，造成严重内存不均衡，限制可行序列长度；2）后续分块因依赖前面分块需要更多注意力计算，导致分块级延迟不均衡。

Method: 提出MOCAP框架，包含两个核心组件：1）Memory-Balanced KV Reallocation (MBKR)：通过跨流水线阶段重新分配KV缓存来缓解内存不均衡，扩展可行序列长度；2）Latency-Balanced Chunk Partitioning (LBCP)：在注意力成本增长和KV重分配开销下平衡分块执行成本，提高流水线效率。

Result: 相比GPipe，MOCAP平均降低76.4%端到端延迟，提升3.24倍吞吐量；相比Terapipe，最大支持序列长度提升最多1.31倍。

Conclusion: MOCAP通过内存协调的分块流水线设计，有效解决了晶圆级芯片上长上下文预填充的内存和延迟不均衡问题，显著提升了预填充推理的性能和可处理的序列长度上限。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in prefill-only workloads, where end-to-end latency is dominated by the prefill phase. For long-context prefill, communication overhead grows with sequence length and quickly becomes a bottleneck on conventional GPU systems, making wafer-scale chips (WSCs) a promising substrate due to their high communication bandwidth and large aggregate compute and memory capacity. A natural way to accelerate prefill is to partition a long input sequence into multiple chunks and execute them in a finer-grained pipeline across devices. However, directly applying this idea to long-context prefill on WSCs remains challenging. First, causal dependency across chunks causes KV cache to accumulate unevenly across pipeline stages, creating severe memory imbalance and limiting the feasible sequence length. Second, later chunks require more attention computation because each chunk depends on preceding chunks, leading to chunk-level latency imbalance.
  To address these challenges, we present MOCAP, a memory-orchestrated chunked pipelining framework for prefill-only LLM inference on WSCs. MOCAP introduces Memory-Balanced KV Reallocation (MBKR) to alleviate memory imbalance by redistributing KV cache across pipeline stages, thereby extending the feasible sequence length. It further incorporates Latency-Balanced Chunk Partitioning (LBCP) to balance chunk execution cost under both attention-cost growth and KV reallocation overhead, improving pipeline efficiency. Experimental results show that, compared with GPipe, MOCAP achieves 76.4\% lower end-to-end latency and 3.24$\times$ higher throughput on average. MOCAP also extends the maximum supported sequence length by up to 1.31$\times$ compared with Terapipe.

</details>


<div id='cs.OS'></div>

# cs.OS [[Back]](#toc)

### [172] [Energy-Based Fair Queuing Scheduler for Mobile Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20602)
*Deshpande Mandar Anil*

Main category: cs.OS

TL;DR: 本文在Linux操作系统上实现了Energy-based Fair Queuing (EFQ)调度算法，该算法将经典公平队列扩展到能量域，旨在为能量受限的移动系统提供比例功率分配和严格的时间约束满足。实验表明EFQ在能量管理和实时调度方面均优于CFS调度器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为能量受限的移动系统提供电池续航保证，需要在操作系统级实现有效的功耗管理方案。传统的调度算法未考虑能量公平性，因此需要一种能够提供比例功率分配并满足时间约束的调度算法。

Method: 基于Linux CFS调度器的结构实现EFQ算法以降低调度开销；开发了多种负载类型的测试平台；从能量管理和实时调度两个维度评估算法性能。

Result: 能量管理方面：EFQ比CFS调度器更有效，能够实现系统功率的比例分配，且与能量消耗设备无关；实时调度方面：EFQ在能量估计误差和活跃任务数增加时，仍能实现严格的时间约束满足和鲁棒的响应时间。

Conclusion: EFQ算法在能量受限的移动系统中是一种有效的调度方案，能够兼顾能量公平分配和实时约束满足。

Abstract: This paper presents a concrete implementation and a comprehensive assessment of the Energy-based Fair Queuing (EFQ) scheduling algorithm based on the Linux operating system. EFQ is an extended application of the classical fair queuing algorithm in the energy domain. It is designed to provide proportional power sharing as well as effective time-constraint compliance in energy-centric Power Management (PM) schemes, a type of operating system-level PM scheme targeted at providing a battery lifetime guarantee for energy-limited mobile systems. In this work, the structure of the Linux Completely Fair Scheduler (CFS) has been effectively utilized to ease the EFQ implementation and to reduce the scheduling overhead. To assess the properties of the EFQ scheduler, a test-bench based on various types of load has been developed and tested. The EFQ algorithm is assessed from two aspects: energy management and real-time scheduling. Experimental results on energy management show that EFQ is more effective than the CFS scheduler in managing energy and it can achieve a proportional share of the system power regardless of the device on which the energy is spent. Experimental results on real-time scheduling demonstrate that EFQ can achieve strict time-constraint compliance and a robust response time when the energy estimation error and the number of active tasks increase.

</details>


<div id='cs.PF'></div>

# cs.PF [[Back]](#toc)

### [173] [Does Mixture-of-Experts Actually Help Inference on Consumer and Edge Hardware? An Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21428)
*Alfarizy Alfarizy,Hung Truong Thanh Nguyen,René Richard,Roozbeh Razavi-Far,Hung Cao*

Main category: cs.PF

TL;DR: MoE语言模型的活跃参数优势在带宽受限的边缘设备上无法转化为实际的推理加速，其推理成本主要由总参数量而非活跃参数量决定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管MoE模型理论上每token仅激活少量专家，FLOPs接近小密集模型，但其实际推理速度、成本和能效是否优于可比密集模型尚不明确。本文旨在通过消费级和边缘硬件实测验证这一差距。

Method: 在Apple M2 Pro笔记本和NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 8 GB边缘设备上，通过llama.cpp对OLMoE-1B-7B（1.3B活跃/6.9B总参数）与三个密集基线模型进行对照实验，测量吞吐量、内存占用和片上能耗。同时对llama.cpp解码图进行逐节点计时，分析路由开销占比。

Result: OLMoE在笔记本上仅落后同活跃参数密集模型约10%，但在边缘设备上落后约31%，且每token能耗为密集模型的2.1倍，峰值内存触及8 GB上限。路由开销在MoE块中占比低于9%，性能差距主要源于总参数内存占用、专家分发和KV-cache压力。

Conclusion: 在带宽受限的边缘硬件上，MoE的稀疏激活无法弥补设备本身的瓶颈，推理成本由总参数量主导而非活跃参数量。该结论受限于单一MoE模型规模、参数尺度及两种设备类型。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models are often described as ideal for resource-constrained inference. Each token activates only a small subset of experts, so the per-token compute cost, in floating-point operations (FLOPs), resembles that of a much smaller dense model. Whether that FLOP advantage survives in practice is far less clear. We ask whether MoE models actually run faster and cheaper than comparable dense models on consumer-grade and edge hardware. We benchmark OLMoE-1B-7B (1.3 B active of 6.9 B total) against three dense baselines on an Apple M2 Pro and an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 8 GB through llama.cpp, measuring throughput, memory, and on-device energy. The answer is device-dependent: OLMoE's active-parameter advantage is only partly realised on the laptop (~10% behind the same-active Llama-3.2-1B) and erodes on the edge device (~31% behind, at 2.1$\times$ the energy per token, with peak memory at the 8 GB ceiling). Patching llama.cpp to time the decode graph node-by-node shows routing accounts for under 9% of MoE-block compute on the cleaner edge backend, so the gap reflects total-parameter memory footprint, expert dispatch, and KV-cache pressure rather than routing. The implication is that on bandwidth-bound edge hardware, inference cost tracks total parameters, not active ones, and sparse activation does not buy back what the device is constrained on. These findings are bounded to one MoE model at this parameter scale and two devices, and we release the full measurement harness and per-run data.

</details>


### [174] [Enabling Cloud-Level Accuracy in Edge AI through IoT Data Preprocessing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22496)
*Aygün Varol,Katarzyna Kołodziej,Łukasz Sobczak,Michał Romaszewski,Przemysław Głomb,Naser Hossein Motlagh,Mirka Leino,Johanna Virkki*

Main category: cs.PF

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结构化提示构建框架，通过将原始IoT传感器数据逐步转换为富文本表示（原始值、阈值感知描述、环境摘要标志），提升本地小模型在智能环境监测中的数值推理能力。在室内外空气质量与热舒适数据集上，该方法将本地模型准确率从50.9%提升至81.7%（室内）和从63.7%提升至89.3%（室外），推理延迟仅0.22秒，有效缩小了本地与云端LLM的性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 云端部署LLM用于IoT传感器数据分析存在延迟、隐私和连接性问题，而本地边缘小模型在直接处理原始传感器读数时数值推理能力较弱。因此，本文旨在探索是否可以通过提示端预处理来改善本地LLM在环境监测中的准确率-延迟权衡。

Method: 提出结构化提示构建框架，将原始空气质量与热舒适测量值逐步转化为三种渐增丰富的文本表示：原始传感器值、阈值感知描述、紧凑环境摘要标志。使用室内（Raspberry Pi/BME680）和室外（赫尔辛基、卡托维兹、华沙）数据集构建二元LLM查询数据集，评估5个本地和5个云端LLM在三种提示变体及两种推理模式（含/不含思维链）下的表现。

Result: 提示富集显著提升本地模型准确率：无CoT模式下，本地准确率从原始提示的50.9%提升至最富提示的81.7%（室内），室外从63.7%提升至89.3%。本地无CoT推理延迟最低（均值约0.22秒），而CoT大幅增加推理时间。

Conclusion: 轻量级提示端预处理能够缩小本地与云端LLM的性能差距，支持低延迟的智能环境IoT分析场景。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) offer a natural-language interface for interpreting Internet of Things (IoT) sensor data in smart environments; however, cloud deployment introduces latency, privacy, and connectivity concerns. Local LLMs can reduce these limitations, but compact edge-deployable models often show weaker numerical reasoning when raw sensor readings are provided directly. This paper investigates whether prompt-side preprocessing can improve the accuracy-latency trade-off of local LLMs for environmental monitoring. We propose a structured prompt construction framework that transforms raw air-quality and thermal-comfort measurements into progressively enriched textual representations: raw sensor values, threshold-aware descriptions, and compact environmental summary flags. The approach is evaluated using indoor Raspberry Pi/BME680 datasets from Tampere University and outdoor air-quality datasets from Helsinki, Katowice, and Warsaw. We construct a binary LLM query dataset covering air quality, thermal comfort, and joint environmental conditions, and evaluate five local and five cloud LLMs across three prompt variants and two inference modes, with and without chain-of-thought prompting. Results show that prompt enrichment substantially improves local-model accuracy. In No-CoT mode, local accuracy increases from 50.9% to 81.7% indoors and from 63.7% to 89.3% outdoors from the raw to the most enriched prompt. Local No-CoT inference is the fastest configuration, with mean latency close to 0.22 s, while CoT substantially increases inference time. These findings suggest that lightweight prompt-side preprocessing can narrow the local--cloud performance gap and support low-latency IoT analytics in smart environments.

</details>


<div id='cs.DC'></div>

# cs.DC [[Back]](#toc)

### [175] [DPIFrame: A Dual-Level Parallelism Acceleration Framework for CTR Model Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21101)
*Dezhi Yi,Huifeng Guo,Kunpeng Xie,Zhaolong Jian,Haochi Yu,Wenxuan He,Zhenhua Dong,Ruiming Tang,Ye Lu*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出DPIFrame，首个面向GPU的CTR模型双重并行推理框架，通过双并行架构、高效多表查找算法和广度优先流调度策略，相比PyTorch实现5.83倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CTR模型在GPU上部署时，串行计算模式与并行模型结构之间存在严重不匹配，导致推理效率低下。

Method: 提出DPIFrame框架，包含：(a) 双并行架构，实现模块内和模块间并行推理；(b) 高效多表查找算法，通过预先预估全局工作负载优化嵌入操作；(c) 广度优先流调度策略，实现GPU上并行计算的细粒度管理。

Result: 在两个真实数据集上的实验表明，DPIFrame相比PyTorch减少嵌入延迟23.0倍；相比PyTorch、TorchRec、HugeCTR和OneFlow，推理速度分别提升5.83倍、4.29倍、2.15倍和2.0倍。

Conclusion: DPIFrame通过双重并行化设计，有效解决了CTR模型在GPU上的推理效率瓶颈，达到SOTA性能。

Abstract: Deep learning technology has enhanced the ability of Click-through rate (CTR) prediction models to learn features and improve prediction accuracy. However, it is challenging to deploy CTR models on GPU smoothly and perform inference efficiently, because there is a huge mismatch between the serial computational pattern and the parallel model structure. In this paper, we propose DPIFrame, the first dual parallelizable framework to accelerate CTR model inference. In DPIFrame, a) a dual parallelizable architecture is proposed to perform parallel CTR model inference in both intra-module and inter-module; b) an efficient multi-table lookup algorithm is presented for embedding operations through anticipating the whole workload in advance; c) a breadth-first stream scheduling strategy is designed for fine-grained management of parallel computation on GPU to further supporting the dual parallel execution. Extensive experiments are conducted on two real-world datasets, and the results highlight that DPIFrame can reduce the embedding latency efficiently by \textbf{23.0$\times$} compared to PyTorch. Compared with PyTorch, TorchRec, HugeCTR, and OneFlow, DPIFrame can achieve state-of-the-art inference performance on GPU with speedups of \textbf{5.83$\times$}, \textbf{4.29$\times$}, \textbf{2.15$\times$}, and \textbf{2.0$\times$}, respectively.

</details>


### [176] [Constant-Time Certificate Selection for Local Broadcast Repair in Dense Gaussian and Eisenstein--Jacobi Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21132)
*Bader Albader*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文针对稠密高斯网络和Eisenstein-Jacobi网络中的广播树修复问题，提出了常数时间（O(1)时间和内存）的证书选择器。该选择器仅需故障坐标即可在1-2个故障场景下快速选择修复边缘，验证了146,156个（高斯）和52,395个（EJ）故障案例，零失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在代数互连网络中，基于坐标约简的广播树在处理器故障时会分裂为多个健康组件。已有的基于搜索的修复方法需要线性扫描网络来选取修复方案，效率较低，因此需要更高效的修复机制。

Method: 提出证书选择器（certificate selector），在O(1)时间和O(1)内存下，仅根据故障坐标对相对故障几何进行分类，选择坐标约简方向，并返回有界有序的组件跨越修复边集合。对稠密高斯网络G_k和Eisenstein-Jacobi网络H_t分别设计了对应的选择器，并进行了穷举严格验证。

Result: 对于G_k，任意|F|≤2的无源故障集可在深度≤k+2内修复，使用恰好c-1条外部跨越边。对于H_t，单故障在深度t+1内修复，双故障在深度t+2内修复，同样使用c-1条外部修复边。穷举验证覆盖G_k（k=5~12）的146,156个案例和H_t（t=2~8）的52,395个案例，连通性、无环性、精确修复计数和深度边界均零失败。

Conclusion: 提出的常数时间证书选择器在1-2故障场景下能可靠修复广播树，避免了传统线性扫描的开销，为大规模代数互连网络的容错广播提供了高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Dense Gaussian and Eisenstein--Jacobi (EJ) networks are algebraic interconnection networks with compact coordinate balls, fixed degree, and simple modular addressing. A source-centered coordinate-reduction tree gives a non-redundant one-to-all broadcast in the fault-free network, but processor faults can split the tree into multiple healthy components. Unlike search-based repair methods that require a linear scan of the network to select the repair plan, the certificate selectors introduced here operate in $O(1)$ time and $O(1)$ memory, consulting only the fault coordinates. This paper develops this stronger formulation for the one- and two-fault regime: a constant-time certificate selector. Given only the faulty coordinates, the selector classifies the relative fault geometry, chooses a coordinate-reduction orientation, and returns a bounded ordered set of component-crossing repair edges. For dense Gaussian networks $G_k$, every source-free fault set with $|F|\le2$ is repaired with depth at most $k+2$ and with exactly $c-1$ external component-crossing edges for the selected fault-pruned orientation. For dense EJ networks $H_t$, every one-fault placement is repaired within depth $t+1$, and every two-fault placement is repaired within depth $t+2$, again with exactly $c-1$ external repair edges. Exhaustive strict validation confirms the Gaussian selector over $146{,}156$ one- and two-fault cases for $k=5,\ldots,12$ and the EJ selector over $52{,}395$ cases for $t=2,\ldots,8$, with zero failures in connectivity, acyclicity, exact repair count, or depth bound.

</details>


### [177] [KineticSim: A Lightweight, High-Performance Execution Engine for Real-Time Market Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21784)
*Shakya Jayakody,Prarthinie Jayakody*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出并实现了一种持久化状态携带的并行清算设计模式（KineticSim），通过将模拟状态缓存在线程块共享内存中、使用共享内存原子操作聚合智能体行为、协作执行清算函数，将每步关键路径深度从Theta(L+A)降至Theta(log L + ceil(A/L))，并在GPU上达到547亿智能体事件/秒的吞吐量，相比CPU(NumPy)加速3406倍，相比PyTorch GPU加速27.8倍，相比JAX GPU加速42.8倍，同时内存消耗仅约为PyTorch的十分之一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模多智能体金融市场模拟（如限价订单簿）对于市场设计、监管压力测试和强化学习至关重要，但传统CPU模拟器受限于顺序处理瓶颈，而向量化GPU框架则面临内核启动开销和冗余全局内存往返的问题，亟需一种高效的并行加速方案。

Method: 提出持久化、携带状态的并行清算设计模式：将可变模拟状态缓存在线程块共享内存中跨步边界持久化；通过共享内存原子操作聚合智能体行为；协作式解析清算函数。基于该模式实现KineticSim轻量级GPU执行引擎，并行模拟大规模限价订单簿集成。

Result: 峰值吞吐量超过547亿智能体事件/秒；单个工作负载上，相比CPU(NumPy)加速3406倍，PyTorch GPU加速27.8倍，JAX GPU加速42.8倍，naive CUDA基线加速8.4倍；GPU内存使用量约为PyTorch的十分之一；53种配置下两种CUDA引擎生成逐位一致的订单簿，聚合统计量与CPU参考的偏差在0.1%以内。

Conclusion: 该持久化并行清算模式可推广至其他需要状态持久化和块局部化归约的迭代多智能体工作负载，为大规模基于智能体的金融模拟提供了高效的GPU加速方案。

Abstract: Simulating financial markets at scale with multi-agent (Agent-Based) models is critical for market design, regulatory stress-testing, and reinforcement learning, but traditional CPU simulators are bottlenecked by sequential processing while vectorized GPU frameworks suffer from kernel-launch overhead and redundant global-memory round-trips. We formalize, analyze, and evaluate a reusable parallel design pattern: persistent, state-carrying clearing for iterative multi-agent reductions. By caching mutable simulation state in thread-block shared memory across step boundaries, aggregating agent actions via shared-memory atomics, and resolving the clearing function cooperatively, the pattern reduces the per-step critical-path depth from Theta(L+A) for sequential clearing (L price-grid ticks, A agents) to Theta(log L + ceil(A/L)) and makes global-memory traffic independent of the step count. We implement this in KineticSim, a lightweight GPU execution engine that simulates massive ensembles of limit-order books in parallel, reaching a peak throughput of over 54.7 billion agent-events per second. On a fixed workload it delivers speedups of 3406x over CPU (NumPy), 27.8x over PyTorch GPU, 42.8x over JAX GPU, and 8.4x over a naive custom CUDA baseline, while using roughly an order of magnitude less GPU memory than PyTorch. Across 53 configurations the two custom CUDA engines produce bitwise-identical order books, and aggregate statistics match the CPU reference to within 0.1%. The pattern generalizes to other iterative multi-agent workloads requiring state-persistent, block-localized reductions.

</details>


### [178] [Re-Rooting-Assisted Edge-Minimum Runtime Repair for Node and Link Failures in Dense Eisenstein--Jacobi Broadcast Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21133)
*Bader Albader*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文针对稠密Eisenstein-Jacobi (EJ)网络中节点/链路联合故障，提出基于选定三元组(r,θ,K_{r,θ})的混合修复方法，给出了修复成功充要条件（健康子图连通性），证明了确定性保证（单/双故障节点可通过重定根置于距离-t边界，单链路故障至多需1条跨边修复，修复深度≤2t+1），并通过26万次仿真验证了100%恢复率和显著减少修复边数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EJ网络中直径级生成树在节点或链路故障时会碎片化，现有方法缺乏应对联合节点/链路故障的系统性修复方案，需要一种统一的故障恢复分析框架。

Method: 定义选定三元组(根, EJ坐标约化方向, 健康分量图)作为分析单元，推导混合修复的充要条件（健康子图连通性），并基于此设计确定性重路由策略（重定根、跨边映射、浅层入口选择）。

Result: 1) 修复成功当且仅当健康EJ图连通；2) 连通时，K_{r,θ}的生成树映射恰好c-1条跨边（对选定修剪树最小）；3) 单/双故障节点可重定根至距离-t边界；4) 单链路故障至多1条跨边修复；5) 修复深度≤2t+1；6) 26万次仿真验证100%恢复率，修复边数显著低于固定源修复。

Conclusion: 提出的混合修复方法能有效应对EJ网络中的联合节点/链路故障，具备确定性的性能保证，全局BFS、近失和cap敏感性审计揭示了可达性、转发状态变更与排名根选择之间的权衡。

Abstract: One-to-all broadcasting in dense Eisenstein--Jacobi (EJ) networks relies on diameter-level spanning trees that fragment when nodes or links fail. This paper introduces the selected triple $(r,θ,\Kcomp_{r,θ})$--a chosen root, a chosen EJ coordinate-reduction orientation, and the healthy component graph induced by that choice--as the fundamental unit of analysis for joint node/link fault recovery. The central result is a necessary and sufficient condition: hybrid repair succeeds if and only if the healthy EJ graph $G'=\Ht-\Fv-\Fe$ is connected. When $G'$ is connected, a spanning tree of $\Kcomp_{r,θ}$ maps to exactly $c-1$ component-crossing repair edges, which is minimum for the selected pruned tree. Deterministic guarantees include: one/two faulty nodes are always placed on the distance-$t$ boundary by re-rooting; a single failed link is either avoided or repaired by exactly one crossing edge; and the repaired depth satisfies $D_{r,θ}\le 2t+1$ under shallowest-layer entry selection. A 260,000-trial validation campaign confirms 100\% recovery and substantial repair-edge reduction over fixed-source repair across five network scales up to $N=120601$ nodes, while global-BFS, near-miss, and cap-sensitivity audits clarify the tradeoff between reachability, forwarding-state changes, and ranked root selection.

</details>


### [179] [Re-Rooting-Assisted Edge-Minimum Runtime Repair for Node and Link Failures in Dense Gaussian Broadcast Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21134)
*Bader Albader*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对稠密高斯广播网络的运行时恢复框架，通过重选根节点使已知故障成为边界叶子，并利用最少c-1条外部修复边连接健康组件。实验在多达80,401节点、280,000次静态测试中实现了100%的恢复率，重选根策略相比固定源修复平均减少80-100%的修复边。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稠密高斯网络是四次代数网络，其广播树虽然高效，但在节点故障、链路故障和运行时发现的故障下非常脆弱，需要一种鲁棒的运行时恢复机制。

Method: 提出运行时恢复框架：(1) 重选根节点，使已知节点故障成为边界叶子；(2) 过滤故障链路；(3) 通过连接修剪后树的健康组件来修复间隙。证明了连通的健康组件图需要恰好c-1条外部修复边，并给出了确定性单链路修复、常数大小的边界交集原语、链路规避排除测试和局部障碍界等理论工具。

Result: 在k∈{10,25,50,100,200}、最高80,401节点、280,000次静态测试和15,000次瞬态测试中，确定性有界场景恢复率100%，多链路故障99.998%，启发式场景99.963%。重选根减少80-100%修复边。Noxim仿真确认了数据包完整执行。

Conclusion: 该框架以边最小化为目标而非通用完成周期最优，消融实验表明完成时间取决于重定位、调度、交付尾部和选择器目标，因此论文声明的是边最小化修复而非通用完成周期优势。

Abstract: Dense Gaussian networks are degree-four algebraic networks with compact diameter and coordinate-based routing. Their diameter-level broadcast trees are efficient but fragile under node, link, and runtime-discovered faults. This paper develops a runtime recovery framework for dense Gaussian broadcast networks under static node/link faults and mixed faults, plus single-link faults discovered live. The method re-roots the source so known node faults become boundary leaves whenever possible, then filters failed links and repairs gaps by connecting healthy components of the pruned tree. For a selected root with connected healthy component graph, we prove exactly $c-1$ external repair edges are necessary and sufficient. We also prove deterministic single-link repair, give a constant-size boundary-intersection primitive for source selection, derive a link-avoidance exclusion test, and add a local-obstruction bound explaining why high-order cuts vanish as $k$ grows. Experiments over $k\in\{10,25,50,100,200\}$, up to $80{,}401$ nodes, $280{,}000$ static trials, and $15{,}000$ transient trials show 100\% recovery for deterministic and bounded regimes, $99.998\%$ for multi-link faults, and $99.963\%$ for heuristic regimes; non-recovered trials are explained by disconnected components or relocation failure. Re-rooting reduces average repair edges by 80--100\% versus fixed-source repair. Patched Gaussian-link Noxim replays confirm packet-complete execution and show re-rooting reduces repair edges, components, and depth. A completion-cycle audit separates repair benefit from latency: ablations confirm completion time depends on relocation, scheduling, delivery tail, and selector objective, so the paper claims edge-minimum repair rather than universal completion-cycle dominance.

</details>


### [180] [Recency/Frequency Adaptive KV Caching for Large Language Model Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21238)
*Yang Shen,Meghana Madhyastha,Robert Underwood,Bogdan Nicolae,Randal Burns*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自适应KV缓存管理策略，动态分配缓存空间给近期和频繁出现的KV块，替代传统LRU策略，解决了多工作负载下缓存相互冲刷的问题，在合成和真实负载上分别提升了最高10.8%和2.1%的缓存命中率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的LRU缓存淘汰策略在多样化的推理工作负载下会导致不同任务之间相互冲刷对方的缓存，缺乏对工作负载多样性的自适应能力，缓存效率低下。

Method: 将自适应缓存机制集成到KV缓存管理中，动态地在近期出现（recently occurring）和频繁出现（frequently occurring）的KV块之间分配缓存空间，替代传统的最近最少使用（LRU）策略。

Result: 在合成文档问答负载上，KV缓存命中率提升最高10.8%，首Token生成时间（TTFT）降低最多12.6%；在真实对话负载上，分别提升2.1%和2.0%；该方法在批量推理中表现良好。

Conclusion: 该方法具有良好的泛化能力、可解释性，能有效适应多样化工作负载，优于vLLM中使用的朴素LRU策略。

Abstract: Key-value (KV) caching is a powerful technique for accelerating large language model inference and generation. Inference workloads are large and diverse, which makes them difficult to cache effectively. Existing cache management strategies adopt the least-recently-used policy for evicting cache blocks. However, LRU leads to multiple unrelated workloads flushing each other's caches. To address this, we integrate adaptive caching that dynamically allocates cache space between recently and frequently occurring KV blocks. Evaluations show that it improves the KV cache hit rate by up to 10.8% and reduces time to first token by up to 12.6% over naive vLLM on synthetic document question answering workloads, and 2.1% and 2.0% respectively on real-world conversation workloads. The method generalizes well to batch inference and demonstrates clear interpretability while effectively accommodating diverse workloads.

</details>


### [181] [SwarmX: Agentic Scheduling for Low-Latency Agentic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21401)
*Yeqi Huang,Yanwei Ye,Guomin Chen,Wenhao Su,Bin Gong,Jialian Li,Zhan Lu,Yangshen Deng,Xuan Sun,Le Xu,Luo Mai*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: SwarmX是一个面向低延迟Agentic AI应用的调度系统，通过调度专用神经预测器捕捉提示词、设备、运行时和目标模型特征，结合路由器与扩展器实现尾部感知决策，在近千GPU和百万CPU核心的生产部署中，相比现有调度器将尾部延迟降低最多61.5%，吞吐量提升至2倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Agentic AI应用包含多次模型调用和工具执行，其推理时间和调用结构取决于提示词语义，传统调度方法无法满足低延迟服务需求，亟需针对性的调度方案。

Method: SwarmX设计调度专用神经预测器来捕捉提示词、设备、运行时和目标模型特征，将分布级预测暴露给路由器和扩展器以支持尾部感知决策，并提供预测器训练与在线自适应机制，最终整合为调度器-智能体框架以兼容现有调度和模型服务基础设施。

Result: 在生产部署（近千GPU、百万CPU核心）和128-GPU测试床实验中，针对多智能体代码生成、深度研究和多模态Agentic工作流，SwarmX将尾部延迟降低最多61.5%，在相同SLO下吞吐量达生产调度器的2倍。

Conclusion: SwarmX通过神经预测驱动的调度器-智能体框架，有效解决了Agentic AI应用的低延迟调度难题，显著优于现有调度方案。

Abstract: Agentic AI applications compose multiple model calls and tool executions, creating new scheduling challenges for GPU-CPU clusters. Their inference time and model-call structure often depend on prompt semantics, making conventional scheduling approaches ineffective for low-latency serving. This paper presents SwarmX, a system that implements agentic scheduling for low-latency agentic applications. SwarmX uses scheduling-specific neural predictors to capture prompt, device, runtime, and target-model features; exposes distributional predictions to routers and scalers for tail-aware decisions; and provides mechanisms for predictor training and online adaptation. These predictors and mechanisms are integrated into a scheduler-agent framework that provides a common substrate for integration with existing scheduling and model-serving infrastructure. We evaluate SwarmX using production deployment (nearly one thousand GPUs and one million CPU cores) and controlled experiments on a 128-GPU testbed. Across multi-agent code generation, deep research, and multimodal agentic workflows, SwarmX reduces tail latency by up to 61.5% compared to state-of-the-art schedulers and sustains up to 2x the throughput of production schedulers under the same SLO.

</details>


### [182] [Node-Level Performance and Energy Characterization of Flagship Science Applications on SuperMUC-NG Phase 2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23265)
*Salvatore Cielo,Elmira Birang,Alexander Pöppl,Sajad Azizi,Plamen Dobrev,Margarita Egelhofer,Ivan Pribec,Gerald Mathias*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了SuperMUC-NG phase 2系统上五个科学工作负载（GROMACS、LAMMPS、OpenGadget3、AthenaK、deal.II）在CPU-only（SPR）与CPU+GPU（SPR+PVC）配置下的吞吐量和能效。结果表明，GPU卸载可带来4-12倍的吞吐量提升和最高15倍的能效提升，但收益受问题粒度影响，且CPU的功率预算利用率显著低于GPU。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统评估新一代Intel Xeon Platinum 8480+ CPU与Data Center GPU Max 1550（Ponte Vecchio）加速器在真实科学计算负载下的性能和能效表现，为异构计算架构的部署和优化提供参考。

Method: 选取分子动力学（GROMACS、LAMMPS）、天体物理与宇宙学（OpenGadget3、AthenaK）及有限元PDE求解器（deal.II）五个旗舰科学工作负载，在SuperMUC-NG phase 2系统上对比CPU-only（SPR）与CPU+GPU（SPR+PVC）配置。通过p3em或Energy Aware Runtime（EAR）进行轻量级代码插桩测量能耗，评估吞吐量（计算单元/墙钟秒）和能效（计算单元/焦耳）。

Result: GPU卸载实现4-12倍吞吐量提升和最高15倍能效提升，其中LAMMPS和AthenaK收益最大。但性能与能效收益高度依赖问题粒度，小网格块尺寸下AthenaK的加速优势显著下降。CPU的功率预算利用率系统性地低于GPU，表明CPU执行时大部分热设计功耗未被充分利用。

Conclusion: Intel Data Center GPU Max 1550加速器在科学计算中展现出显著的性能和能效优势，但需要足够的问题规模才能充分发挥；当前CPU架构在功率利用率方面存在明显不足，异构计算是提升能效的有效路径。

Abstract: We present a systematic performance and energy-efficiency characterization of five flagship scientific workloads on SuperMUC-NG phase 2, the 28 PetaFLOPs system at the Leibniz Supercomputing Center (LRZ) equipped with Intel Xeon Platinum 8480+ and Intel Data Center GPU Max 1550 (Ponte Vecchio, PVC) accelerators. The selected codes span molecular dynamics (gromacs, lammps), astrophysics and cosmology (OpenGadget3, AthenaK), and finite-element PDE solvers from the dealii-X Center of Excellence. For each code we measure throughput and energy efficiency expressed as compute-elements per wall-clock second (or per Joule of consumed energy) on a single compute node, comparing CPU-only (SPR) against combined CPU+GPU (SPR+PVC) configurations where available. Energy measurements rely on lightweight code instrumentation with p3em, or the Energy Aware Runtime (EAR) present on the system. Our results show that GPU offload yields $4-12\times$ higher throughput and up to $15\times$ better energy efficiency compared to CPU-only execution, with lammps and AthenaK benefiting most. However, both throughput and energy gains are sensitive to problem granularity: insufficient work per GPU tile erodes the accelerator advantage, as clearly observed in AthenaK at small mesh-block sizes. The power-budget utilization is systematically lower for CPUs than it is for GPUs, indicating that even at peak useful-work rate, most applications running on CPUs leave a significant fraction of the node's thermal envelope unused.

</details>


### [183] [Bridging Design and Execution: A Visual Graph Editor for Edge and Cloud Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21416)
*Katarina-Glorija Grujić,Nikola Stanković,Maja Vukasović,Miloš Simić*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向边缘与云计算环境的领域特定可视化图编辑器，支持用核、共享内存节点和事件触发器三种一等抽象来建模模块化应用，并自动序列化为JSON/XML进而对接执行API，通过联邦学习工作流示例展示了其设计到部署的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘与云计算环境中模块化应用的协调设计涉及多个计算核、共享数据和事件驱动执行，现有工具缺乏统一的建模界面和明确的执行语义，难以弥合设计时建模与运行时部署之间的鸿沟。

Method: 提出一种领域特定的可视化图编辑器，以核（计算单元）、共享内存节点（分布式数据）、事件触发器（执行依赖）为三种一等抽象，用户通过统一界面可视化构图，配置节点属性并连接元素以定义数据流与控制流，图结构自动序列化为JSON/XML并传递至执行API。

Result: 编辑器生成的图模型能够提升对数据共享、执行顺序和依赖关系的推理能力，支持自动序列化与执行API对接，并通过联邦学习工作流实例验证了其在分布式场景中的适用性。

Conclusion: 该工作为分布式环境中的模块化计算的可视化编排奠定了基础，相比传统工作流编辑器和通用图表工具，提供了显式执行语义、模块化和直接可部署性，并支持用户自定义核、事件类型和替代执行后端，为探索复杂分布式应用提供了可扩展的方案。

Abstract: Designing modular applications for edge and cloud computing environments involves coordinating multiple computational kernels, shared data, and event-driven execution. This paper presents a domain-specific visual graph editor that enables users to model such applications using a unified interface. The editor supports three first-class abstractions: kernels, representing computational units; shared memory nodes, modeling distributed data; and event triggers, capturing execution dependencies. Users can construct graphs visually, configure node properties, and connect elements to define data and control flow.
