*Aarya Vasantlal,Joshua Zolla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MORL-A2C，一种基于优势演员-评论家算法的序列决策扩展，用于多目标个性化可解释健康感知食品推荐系统。通过将推荐建模为K步重排序问题，利用冻结图神经网络嵌入和标量化奖励，在牺牲部分排序质量的情况下大幅提升健康对齐度（H-Score@20从46.05%提升至69.57%），验证了策略驱动的序列优化能有效平衡健康与偏好的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MOPI-HFRS虽通过帕累托优化联合优化偏好、健康和多样性，但其依赖静态的单步权衡解，无法捕捉饮食决策的序列性质，且评估流程中存在削弱基线性能的错误。

Method: 将推荐建模为K步重排序问题，采用优势演员-评论家算法，使用标量化相关度/健康奖励；通过行为克隆（模仿冻结嵌入的点积排序器）进行策略热启动；修正了MOPI-HFRS评估流程中的bug。

Result: 在宏营养素基准上，Recall@20从25.64%降至23.61%，NDCG@20从23.52%降至20.64%，但H-Score@20从46.05%大幅提升至69.57%；全营养素基准上趋势一致。

Conclusion: 策略驱动的序列优化能有效导航多目标食品推荐中健康与偏好的权衡，为提升推荐系统的健康导向提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Unhealthy dietary behavior continues to be a persistent public health issue in the United States, exacerbated by recommendation systems that prioritize user preference without considering nutritional health. The Multi-Objective Personalized Interpretable Health-aware Food Recommendation System (MOPI-HFRS), from which this work extends, addresses this by jointly optimizing preference, health, and diversity through Pareto-based optimization. However, this approach relies on static, per-step tradeoff solutions that fail to capture the sequential nature of dietary decision-making. We introduce MORL-A2C, a sequential decision-making extension to MOPI-HFRS targeting the health-preference axis. Leveraging frozen GNN embeddings, MORL-A2C formulates recommendation as a K-step reranking problem using an Advantage Actor-Critic algorithm with a scalarized relevance/health reward. The policy is warm-started via behavior cloning against a dot-product ranker derived from frozen embeddings. We also identify and correct a non-trivial bug in the MOPI-HFRS evaluation pipeline that understated baseline performance; all results are reported against the corrected baseline. On the macro-nutrient benchmark, MORL-A2C achieves a modest reduction in ranking quality (Recall@20: 25.64% to 23.61%, NDCG@20: 23.52% to 20.64%) in exchange for a substantial improvement in health alignment (H-Score@20: 46.05% to 69.57%), with consistent trends on the full-nutrient benchmark. These findings validate that policy-driven sequential optimization can effectively navigate the health-preference trade-off in multi-objective food recommendation.

</details>


### [475] [Scaling Linear Mode Connectivity and Merging to Billion Parameter Pretrained Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23607)
*Tianyi Li,Zhiqiang Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种双端学习的线性模式连通性（LMC）框架，通过对功能保持的权重变换进行双向优化，首次在十亿参数规模的预训练Transformer上实现了近零损失屏障的线性插值合并。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LMC方法通常只从单一模型端点优化插值路径，限制了其在大型预训练Transformer上的可扩展性和有效性。

Method: 对两个模型分别应用参数化的功能保持权重变换，并引入双端学习过程，使两个模型联合学习各自的变换，共同朝向共享的线性插值路径优化，解决参数对称性问题。

Result: 在中等规模语言模型上首次实现近零损失屏障；ViT-L在整个插值路径上保持69%以上ImageNet top-1精度；十亿参数LLMs仅表现出很小的损失屏障。

Conclusion: 通过正确解决参数对称性，大型预训练Transformer可以通过简单的线性路径进行连接和合并，并显著提升插值性能。

Abstract: Linear mode connectivity (LMC) provides a promising foundation for understanding and merging independently trained neural networks, but existing methods typically optimize the interpolation path from only one model endpoint, limiting their scalability and effectiveness for large pretrained transformers. We propose a novel and scalable framework for enabling LMC-based model merging to {\em billion-parameter pretrained transformers}. Our method applies properly parameterized functionality-preserving weight transformations to align functionally equivalent solutions, and introduces a dual learning procedure in which both models jointly learn their corresponding transformations toward a shared linear interpolation path. This bidirectional optimization substantially reduces interpolation barriers and enables more reliable merging across large-scale architectures. Empirically, we show that our approach achieves near-zero loss barriers on WikiText for language models with medium-sized parameters, representing, to our knowledge, the first demonstration of near-barrier-free linear connectivity at this scale. In the vision domain, ViT-L maintains above 69\% ImageNet top-1 accuracy throughout the interpolation path, while modern billion-parameter LLMs exhibit only small loss barriers. These results suggest that properly resolving parameter symmetries enables large pretrained Transformers to be connected and merged through simple linear paths with substantially improved interpolation performance. Code: https://github.com/VILA-Lab/Dual-Learned-Matching .

</details>


### [476] [Discovering Latent Groups for Robust Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23609)
*Ankur Garg,Ulrich Aïvodji,Samira Ebrahimi Kahou,Vincent Michalski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出神经分类树（NCT）框架，通过树形架构编码子组结构，无需子组标注即可解耦虚假相关中的冲突子组，在五个基准上达到与SOTA相当的鲁棒性，并提供可解释的子组隔离映射。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通过调整网络参数（依赖子组标注或推断的伪标签）来应对虚假相关性，但推理时仅输出类别预测，无法提供样本潜在子组的洞察。本文旨在同时实现鲁棒性和子组层面的可解释性。

Method: 提出神经分类树（NCT），采用树形架构编码子组结构。每个样本根据预测正确性被路由到树的"easy"或"hard"节点，并将路由路径作为下一轮的伪标签，迭代解耦冲突子组，无需子组监督。

Result: 在五个覆盖二分类和多分类虚假相关性的基准上评估，NCT学习的树拓扑结构能一致地隔离少数子组，提供模型架构与数据潜在组结构之间的透明映射，同时达到与最先进方法竞争的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: NCT框架通过树形架构有效解耦了虚假相关中的冲突子组，在保持高鲁棒性的同时提供了强可解释性，为模型架构与数据组结构之间建立了可解释的映射关系。

Abstract: Machine learning models exploit spurious correlations, achieving high average accuracy but failing disproportionately on underrepresented subgroups. Existing methods address this by adjusting network parameters, guided either by subgroup annotations or inferred pseudo-group labels. Yet at inference, these methods produce only a class prediction, with no insight into a sample's latent subgroup. We propose neural classification trees (NCT), a framework that achieves robustness by encoding subgroup structure in its tree-shaped architecture. By routing each sample to an "easy" or "hard" node of this tree -- based on prediction correctness -- and reusing these routes as pseudo-labels for the next iteration, NCT disentangles conflicting subgroups, without requiring subgroup supervision. We evaluate NCT on five benchmarks spanning binary and multi-class spurious correlations. Our experiments show that the learned tree topology provides strong interpretability by consistently isolating minority subgroups, which provides a transparent mapping between the model architecture and the data's latent group structure, while yielding competitive robustness with state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [477] [DiT-Reward: Generative Representations for Text-to-Image Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23626)
*Yuanming Yang,Guoqing Ma,Bo Wang,Yuan Zhang,Wei Tang,Chenyi Li,Haoyang Huang,Nan Duan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DiT-Reward，将预训练的文本到图像扩散Transformer（DiT）转换为奖励模型，通过处理接近干净的图像潜变量并聚合跨层的文本条件图像表示。在相同训练数据下，DiT-Reward在四个偏好基准上均超越HPSv3（HPDv2达85.6%，HPDv3达77.6%），并且在冻结生成骨干网络时仍能提取有效偏好预测。研究发现中间到后期层的表示最强，组合不同阶段的表示有益，且随生成骨干容量正向扩展。用于优化Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large时，DiT-Reward优于HPSv3，推理速度提升1.65倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索生成式表征学习（如图像生成模型所学到的表示）是否也能有效支持生成图像的评估（即奖励预测），从而统一生成与评估任务。

Method: 将预训练的文本到图像扩散Transformer（DiT）转换为奖励模型，通过处理接近干净的图像潜变量，聚合跨Transformer层的文本条件图像表示来预测奖励值。

Result: 在相同训练数据下，DiT-Reward在HPDv2、HPDv3等四个偏好基准上全面超越HPSv3；冻结骨干网络时轻量头部仍有效；中间到后期层表示最强；随骨干容量正向扩展；用于优化Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large时超越HPSv3且推理速度提升1.65倍。

Conclusion: 预训练的生成式DiT模型具备可迁移的表示能力，可用于奖励建模和策略优化，表明生成与评估任务可以共享同一表征空间。

Abstract: Can representations learned for image generation also support the evaluation of generated images? We study text-to-image reward prediction as a downstream task of generative representation learning. To this end, we introduce DiT-Reward, which converts a pretrained text-to-image Diffusion Transformer into a reward model by processing near-clean image latents and aggregating text-conditioned image representations across transformer layers. Under the same training data mixture as HPSv3, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 on all four evaluated preference benchmarks, reaching 85.6% on HPDv2 and 77.6% on HPDv3. When the generative backbone is frozen, a lightweight learned head can still extract meaningful preference predictions from its representations. Probing across depth further reveals that downstream reward performance is strongest in the middle-to-late layers and benefits from combining representations across different stages. We also observe consistent positive scaling with generative backbone capacity. Finally, when used to optimize Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large with Flow-GRPO, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 along the matched training trajectory, with particularly clear gains in realism. Direct latent scoring also achieves a 1.65x inference speedup over HPSv3 with comparable peak memory. These results show that pretrained generative DiTs provide transferable representations for reward modeling and policy optimization.

</details>


### [478] [Muown Implicitly Performs Angular Step-size Decay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23637)
*Florian Hübler,Kai Lion,Antonio Orvieto,Niao He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AngularMuown优化器，将Muown中的方向更新显式解耦为黎曼流形上的步长，并引入可调角步长超参数，性能优于Muown且已在大模型上验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muown优化器虽有效，但其方向更新与幅度更新的耦合导致步长行为不明确。作者希望将方向更新的角步长显式化，使优化过程更可控、更稳定。

Method: 将Muown中基于Muon的方向更新重新解释为归一化方向上的黎曼梯度步，并将幅度参数对角步长的调制作用解耦，提出直接优化归一化方向的AngularMuown，引入可调度角步长乘子。

Result: AngularMuown在modded nanoGPT speedrunning竞赛的per-optimizer类别中领先；在Qwen2-0.5B和1.1B参数MoE模型上验证了可扩展性。

Conclusion: 解耦角步长与径向幅度更新能提升优化器性能与稳定性，AngularMuown可作为Muown的有效改进。

Abstract: Matrix-aware optimizers such as Muon and Muown have recently shown strong empirical performance for pre-training Transformers. In particular, Muown separates each weight matrix into row magnitudes and an un-normalized direction variable, updating the former with Adam and the latter with Muon. We show that the directional update of Muown is equivalent to a Riemannian step on the normalized directions, while the magnitude of the un-normalized parameterization only modulates the angular step size. This explains the step-size stability of Muown and suggests making the angular step size explicit. The resulting method, AngularMuown, optimizes directly over the normalized directions and uses a schedulable angular multiplier decoupled from the radial magnitude update. AngularMuown improves over Muown and, at the time of writing, a preliminary version is leading the per-optimizer category of the modded nanoGPT speedrunning competition. Further experiments on Qwen2-0.5B, and 1.1B parameter mixture-of-experts models confirm the algorithm scales beyond small models. An implementation of the algorithm is available at https://github.com/fhueb/angular-muown

</details>


### [479] [Learning Process Rewards via Success Visitation Matching for Efficient RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23640)
*Raymond Tsao,Andrew Wagenmaker,Sergey Levine*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种将稀疏结果奖励转化为密集过程奖励的简单方法，通过训练判别器区分成功与不成功的过往回合，激励RL策略匹配成功回合的状态-动作访问分布，在不改变最优策略的前提下提供密集反馈，显著加速机器人控制策略的微调速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习中任务奖励天然稀疏（仅在任务完成时+1，其余为0），导致信用分配困难，RL改进缓慢或无效，需要一种将稀疏奖励转化为密集奖励的方法来加速学习。

Method: 训练一个判别器区分历史成功与不成功的回合，利用该判别器生成密集过程奖励，激励当前RL策略匹配成功回合的状态-动作访问模式，同时避免不成功回合的访问模式。

Result: 在模拟和真实机器人操作任务的微调中，该方法相比直接最大化稀疏结果奖励，显著加快了RL微调性能。

Conclusion: 该方法通过匹配所有状态（而非仅任务成功状态）的访问分布来提供密集的进度反馈，且理论上证明不改变最优策略，是一种简单有效的稀疏奖励解决方案。

Abstract: In many modern applications of reinforcement learning (RL), the natural reward for a task of interest is inherently sparse: a reward of 0 is given everywhere except when the task is completed, when a reward of +1 is given. Training a policy to maximize such a sparse reward requires solving a challenging credit assignment problem, leading to slow or ineffective RL improvement. We propose a simple approach to transform a sparse outcome reward into a dense process reward. Our approach relies on training a discriminator to distinguish between previous successful and unsuccessful episodes, and using this discriminator to incentivize the RL-learned policy to match the state-action visitations of successful episodes, while avoiding those of unsuccessful episodes. By incentivizing the policy to match the visitations over all states, not just those that correspond to task success, this reward provides dense feedback on whether progress is being made towards task completion, and, we show, provably achieves this without changing the optimal policy. Focusing on finetuning of robotic control policies, we demonstrate that our approach leads to significantly faster RL finetuning performance on both simulated and real-world manipulation tasks, as compared to simply maximizing the sparse outcome reward.

</details>


### [480] [Dynamic estimation of slowly varying sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23655)
*Prashant Gokhale,Mikhail Khodak,Sandeep Silwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个通用框架，用于在序列元素缓慢变化时顺序逼近各种线性/非线性函数，通过局部自适应地调整估计预算，实现了更紧的路径长度风格变分界 $\mathcal O(\sum α_i)$，优于先前 $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max α_i)$ 的界限，并能以几乎零额外成本在线估计变化量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有序列近似工作（如隐式迹估计）假设已知变化量上界，且预算固定为最坏情况 $\max α_i$，在变化稀疏的稳定序列中效率低下。缺乏一个能处理多样线性/非线性函数、自适应调整预算的通用框架。

Method: 1. 提出一个通用框架，将序列近似从隐式迹估计推广到矩阵幂、谱密度、蒙特卡洛积分、PDE边值问题等多种函数；2. 开发新算法，根据局部变化量 $α_t$ 动态缩放估计预算，实现 $\mathcal O(\sum α_i)$ 的路径长度变分界；3. 在某些场景下实现在线估计 $α_i$，几乎无额外开销。

Result: 获得了更紧的 $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^m α_i)$ 总成本界，优于先前 $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_i α_i)$ 的最坏情况界；将方法适用范围从迹估计扩展到多种线性/非线性函数；证明了变化量可在线上以接近零成本估计。

Conclusion: 该框架使序列近似工具具备通用性和自适应性，在动态迹估计上改进了现有最优保证，适用于更多实际场景。

Abstract: We consider the problem of sequentially approximating functions of each element in a slowly-varying sequence, i.e. one where the magnitude $α_i$ of the difference between the elements at positions $i$ and $i-1$ is small. Recent work on implicit trace estimation shows that when $α_t$ is small, reusing queries to past sequence elements can reduce the overall cost [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021; Woodruff et al., NeurIPS~2022]. We introduce a framework generalizing this to a variety of linear and nonlinear functions on diverse vector spaces, obtaining novel sequential estimation results for matrix powers, spectral densities, Monte Carlo integration, and a boundary value problem from partial differential equations~(PDEs). Furthermore, we develop a novel algorithm for use with this framework that locally scales the estimation budget with $α_t$, obtaining sharper path-length-style variation bounds of form $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^mα_i)$ on the cost of estimating a sequence of length $m$. This improves upon the previous implicit trace estimation bound of $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_iα_i)$ [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021], which is achieved by fixing the query budget using the worst-case $α_i$ and is thus inefficient for stable sequences with rare bursts. Lastly, while all past work assumes a known bound on $α_i$, we show in certain cases how the changes can be estimated on-the-fly with (nearly) no added cost. In summary, our framework makes the sequential approximation toolkit general-purpose and adaptive while improving upon state-of-the-art-guarantees for dynamic trace estimation.

</details>


### [481] [MAS-PromptBench: When Does Prompt Optimization Improve Multi-Agent LLM Systems?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23664)
*Juyang Bai,Laixi Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 系统研究多智能体系统中系统提示优化的潜力，发现其能带来显著性能提升，但效果高度依赖系统配置，且面临搜索空间爆炸等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）的提示优化面临搜索空间指数级增长等独特挑战，现有研究缺乏对提示优化在MAS中有效性、适用条件和影响程度的系统性理解。

Method: 在不同任务、工作流、通信协议和团队规模等广泛MAS配置下，采用两种从单智能体方法自然扩展的提示优化器，进行系统性基准实验。

Result: 提示优化能解锁显著性能增益，但其效果对系统配置高度敏感；揭示了该领域仍存在的开放性挑战。

Conclusion: 系统提示优化在多智能体系统中具有潜力，但性能提升的程度和适用条件因系统配置而异，需要进一步研究以应对已发现的挑战。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a scalable path forward for agentic AI, comprising multiple LLM-based agents, each assigned a system prompt and a position within a workflow that governs inter-agent coordination and output aggregation. System prompts thus form a critical and accessible optimization surface: they specify agents' roles and behaviors, enabling system-level improvements without model finetuning. Although prompt optimization has shown substantial potential for single LLMs, extending it to MAS poses distinct challenges, notably an exponentially growing search space. It remains unclear whether, when, and by how much prompt optimization improves MAS performance, and how sensitive such gains are to system configuration. In this work, we systematically study system-prompt optimization across a broad range of MAS setups varying in task, workflow, communication protocol, and team size, benchmarking two prompt optimizers that naturally extend state-of-the-art single-agent methods. The results reveal its potential to unlock significant gains while exposing open challenges, characterizing when and how much prompt optimization helps across diverse MAS settings.

</details>


### [482] [On the Limits of Prompt-Conditioned Language Models as General-Purpose Learners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23668)
*David Mguni,Julian Ma,Jun Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从信息论和博弈论角度论证，由于语言作为容量受限的通信通道以及对齐约束的存在，基于提示（prompt）的大语言模型（LLM）在理论上无法成为通用问题求解器，即使拥有无限数据也无法消除固有的错误下限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有观点常将LLM描绘为通用求解器，但忽略了语言作为任务信息传递接口的容量限制。本文旨在揭示提示驱动下LLM泛化能力的根本理论边界。

Method: 将用户-系统交互建模为双层廉价交谈（cheap-talk）博弈，概念上分离任务推理与执行，推导PAC-Bayes界以区分有限样本估计误差与不可约的结构性限制。

Result: （1）表达性下限：语言作为容量受限通道，当任务族的信息复杂度超过通道容量时，不同任务变得不可区分，产生无法通过数据、优化或模型缩放消除的正误差下限；（2）目标错位下限：对齐约束将可用输出集限制在可行类之外，导致不可约的失真。

Conclusion: 提示条件化的LLM并非通用问题求解器，存在某些任务族即使在无限数据下也无法正确求解。超越自然语言的接口（如多模态、外部记忆）可能通过增加任务相关信息来缓解这些局限性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are frequently portrayed as general-purpose solvers capable of solving arbitrary tasks. We argue that this view overlooks a fundamental constraint: language is a compressed and capacity-limited interface for conveying task information. Modelling User--System interaction as a bilevel \emph{cheap-talk} game, we analyse how latent tasks are encoded into prompts and reinterpreted under alignment and safety constraints. We introduce a conceptual decomposition separating task inference from execution and derive PAC-Bayes bounds that distinguish finite-sample estimation error from irreducible structural limitations. Our first main result establishes an \emph{expressivity floor}: language acts as a capacity-limited communication channel, and whenever the informational complexity of a task family exceeds the capacity of that channel, distinct tasks become unavoidably indistinguishable to the Solver, inducing a strictly positive error floor that cannot be eliminated by additional data, optimisation, or model scaling alone. We then establish an \emph{objective-misalignment floor}: when alignment constraints restrict the admissible output set, the User-ideal distribution may lie outside the feasible class, inducing an irreducible distortion. Together, these results yield a formal negative conclusion: prompt-conditioned LLMs are not universal problem solvers through prompting alone, as there exist task families for which correct behaviour is provably unattainable even in the infinite-data regime. More broadly, our analysis shows the limits of prompt-based generalisation arise from information-constrained communication and alignment-constrained objectives. This suggests that interfaces beyond natural language, including multimodal observations and, external memory, may reduce the inherent LLM limitations by increasing the task-relevant information available to the System.

</details>


### [483] [Open Problem: Is AdamW Effective Under Heavy-Tailed Noise?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23676)
*Dingzhi Yu,Hongyi Tao,Yuanyu Wan,Luo Luo,Lijun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个开放问题：在重尾噪声（heavy-tailed noise）条件下，AdamW优化器是否能收敛？目前AdamW在LLM预训练中被广泛使用，但其理论分析仍局限于有限方差假设，而实际训练中随机梯度噪声常呈现重尾分布。虽然Sign类优化器（如Lion、Muon）和AdaGrad已被证明在重尾噪声下可收敛，但AdamW的收敛性理论尚未建立。作者通过加权度量正界（positive weighted-metric benchmark）和走廊下界机制（corridor lower-bound mechanism）揭示了分母记忆（denominator memory）可能隐藏大梯度，从而阻碍收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论无法解释AdamW在LLM预训练中实际表现优异的原因，因为LLM训练中的梯度噪声通常呈现重尾分布，而AdamW的理论分析仍基于有限方差假设。需要填补这一理论空白。

Method: 1) 将AdamW在重尾噪声下的收敛性作为开放问题正式提出；2) 证明一个加权度量正界基准（positive weighted-metric benchmark）；3) 设计走廊下界机制（corridor lower-bound mechanism），展示分母记忆如何隐藏大梯度。

Result: 证明了当分母记忆（即二阶矩估计）足够大时，大梯度会被掩盖，导致优化器无法有效响应，形成收敛障碍。

Conclusion: AdamW在重尾噪声下的收敛性仍是一个未解决的开放问题，其分母记忆机制可能成为收敛的障碍。

Abstract: AdamW is the de facto optimizer for training large language models (LLMs), yet the theory behind it still lives mostly in finite-variance regimes. This is increasingly unsatisfying, as empirical evidence indicates that stochastic gradient noise in LLM pretraining is typically heavy-tailed. Recent work shows that sign-based optimizers such as Lion and Muon achieve sharp heavy-tailed rates, and that AdaGrad can also converge under heavy-tailed noise. However, no rigorous convergence theory for AdamW has yet been established in this regime. Can AdamW converge under the same heavy-tailed assumptions, or does its second-moment accumulator create a genuine obstruction? We formulate this as an open problem, prove a positive weighted-metric benchmark, and give a corridor lower-bound mechanism showing how denominator memory can hide large gradients.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [484] [On the Identifiability of User Adaptation in Co-Adaptive Neural Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20569)
*Philip Waggoner*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文分析了共适应人机系统中的可辨识性问题，证明闭环编码器估计无法唯一识别用户适应，而是反映联合系统的特性，并讨论了行为适应解释的意义及识别条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共适应人机系统中，对用户适应行为的闭环编码器估计存在可辨识性问题，无法区分用户适应与系统特性，导致对行为适应的解释可能存在偏差。

Method: 通过理论分析闭环编码器估计的数学性质，证明其不满足唯一性条件，揭示联合系统特性对估计结果的影响，并提出实现可辨识的必要条件。

Result: 闭环编码器估计不能唯一识别用户适应；估计结果混杂了人机联合系统的特性；提出了保证可辨识性的条件。

Conclusion: 研究提醒研究者在解释共适应系统中的行为适应数据时需谨慎，并提供了实现有效识别的方法论指导。

Abstract: We analyze identifiability in co-adaptive human-machine systems. We show that closed-loop encoder estimates do not uniquely identify user adaptation, but instead reflect properties of the joint system. We discuss implications for interpreting behavioral adaptation and propose conditions for identification.

</details>


### [485] [AOHP: An Open-Source OS-Level Agent Harness for Personalized, Efficient and Secure Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23449)
*Shanhui Zhao,Jiacheng Liu,Guohong Liu,Jichao Yan,Jialei Ye,Yuhao Yang,Hao Wen,Shizuo Tian,Yizhen Yuan,Yuxuan Chen,Yunxin Liu,Ju Ren,Ya-Qin Zhang,Chao Huang,Yao Guo,Yuanchun Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AOHP（Android Open Harness Project），一个基于AOSP的智能体原生操作系统框架，将AI智能体视为操作系统的一等公民，通过个性化服务组合、高效智能体接口和安全信息流三种机制，在任务完成率（+21.12%）、token成本（-51.55%）和策略合规性上显著优于传统系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有终端操作系统面向应用中心的工作流设计，缺乏对AI智能体的原生支持，导致智能体运行效率低下、安全风险高，且研究领域缺乏开源的智能体原生操作系统测试平台。

Method: 基于Android Open Source Project (AOSP)构建AOHP，核心设计原则是将智能体视为操作系统的一等公民，引入三种智能体导向的系统机制：1）个性化服务组合（Personalized Service Composition）；2）高效智能体接口（Efficient Agent Interfaces）；3）安全信息流（Secure Information Flow）。同时保持对成熟Android软硬件生态系统的兼容。

Result: 在覆盖操作系统智能体关键能力的挑战性任务上，AOHP相比传统系统：任务完成率提升21.12%，token成本降低51.55%，安全策略合规性更好。

Conclusion: AOHP证明了智能体原生操作系统架构的有效性，为智能体提供一等公民地位能够显著提升任务完成效率和安全性，同时为研究社区提供了探索智能体交互架构原语的开源测试平台。

Abstract: AI agents are driving a new software paradigm, with the ability to autonomously call tools, extract information, manage memory, and complete tasks that span applications and data sources. Most existing end-user operating systems, however, are designed for application-centric workflows and offer little native support for AI agents. This mismatch limits the wider adoption of agents and leads to execution overhead and safety risks when running agents on conventional systems. While the concept of agent-native operating systems is emerging, the research community lacks an open testbed to explore the architectural primitives desired for agent-mediated interaction. We present AOHP (Android Open Harness Project), an OS-level agent harness built on the Android Open Source Project (AOSP). The core design principle of AOHP is to treat agents as first-class OS actors, enabling adaptive user interfaces and agent-friendly runtime environments. AOHP preserves the mature Android software and hardware ecosystem while introducing three agent-oriented system mechanisms: personalized service composition, efficient agent interfaces, and secure information flow. Based on preliminary experiments on challenging tasks covering key capabilities of OS agents, AOHP shows clear advantages in task completion (+21.12% completion rate), execution cost (-51.55% token cost), and security-policy compliance.

</details>


### [486] [Beyond Fixed Budgets: Characterizing the Inelasticity and Limitations of Tree-of-Thought Reasoning Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20599)
*Atkia Mahila,Avinash Maurya,M. Mustafa Rafique,Bogdan Nicolae*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了两种树搜索方法（DPTS和SSDP）在不同计算预算、模型规模和问题难度下的表现，发现DPTS存在冷启动瓶颈（低预算下表现差但高预算下扩展性强），SSDP存在前沿耗尽问题（高效收敛但无法随预算增加而改进），并指出需要自适应搜索策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 树搜索方法在LLM推理中展现潜力，但不同搜索策略在不同计算预算、模型规模和问题难度下的行为缺乏系统研究，这限制了实际部署中策略选择的依据。

Method: 评估两种代表性ToT方法：DPTS（基于蒙特卡洛树搜索）和SSDP（基于语义去重）；使用两个数学推理基准（Math500和GSM8K）、两种模型规模（Llama-3B和Llama-8B）和四种token预算（3k-10k）进行系统对比分析。

Result: DPTS在低预算下因需充分探索才能获得可靠价值估计而表现差（冷启动瓶颈），但在高预算下扩展性强；SSDP能高效到达候选解但节点合并会永久丢弃未探索路径（前沿耗尽），无法随预算增加而改进。两种方法的局限方向相反。

Conclusion: 固定探索策略或固定剪枝策略均无法贯穿整个计算预算连续体，科学推理智能体需要能够根据搜索进度和可用资源自适应调整行为的搜索策略。

Abstract: Tree of Thought (ToT) search has become a promising direction for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models, but deploying these methods in practice raises a question that has received little systematic attention: how do different search strategies behave under varying compute budgets, model sizes, and problem difficulties? In this work, we evaluate two representative ToT methods; DPTS, a Monte Carlo tree search based approach, and SSDP, a semantic deduplication based approach, across two mathematical reasoning benchmarks (Math500 and GSM8K), two model scales (Llama-3B and Llama-8B), and four token budgets (3k--10k). Our analysis reveals that the two methods exhibit limitations that pull in opposite directions. DPTS suffers from a cold-start bottleneck at low budgets: it requires sufficient exploration before its value estimates become reliable, making it a poor fit for resource-constrained settings despite strong scaling behavior at higher budgets. SSDP, on the other hand, reaches candidate solutions efficiently but is prone to frontier depletion; its aggressive node merging permanently discards unexplored paths, leaving it unable to improve regardless of how much budget remains. Together, these findings suggest that neither a fixed exploration strategy nor a fixed pruning strategy is sufficient across compute continuum. We argue that effective search for scientific reasoning agents requires strategies that can adapt their behavior based on search progress and available resources.

</details>


### [487] [The New Associationism: Lessons from Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20600)
*Daniel Rothschild*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 现代AI的成功表明，监督学习（一种基于评估反馈的、统一的、渐进的、错误驱动的学习机制）是人类学习的重要模型，这支持了一种温和的联想主义，同时承认深度学习架构超越了经典联想主义的范畴。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨现代AI的成功对人类学习方式的启示，评估联想主义作为人类学习模型的合理性，并反驳"联想主义机制过于局限而无法解释人类认知能力"的经典论点。

Method: 通过分析现代AI系统（从大语言模型到游戏智能体）的成功机制，论证监督学习作为统一学习原理的普遍性，并对比经典联想主义与深度学习架构的差异。

Result: 监督学习是驱动多种当代AI系统的核心机制，其统一性验证了联想主义的核心主张；但深度学习的成功也依赖于超越经典联想主义的复杂计算架构，监督学习只是其中的一个组成部分。

Conclusion: 现代AI支持一种适度的联想主义：监督学习作为统一的学习机制是合理的，但需要结合超越经典联想主义的复杂架构才能实现人类级别的认知能力。

Abstract: What can the success of modern AI tell us about how humans learn? This paper argues that taking AI seriously as a model of human learning supports a modest but genuine associationism. The central finding is that supervised learning -- learning driven by evaluative feedback -- underlies a surprisingly wide range of contemporary AI systems, from large language models to game-playing agents, differing primarily in how much work is required to generate the relevant feedback signal. This vindicates associationist ideals of a uniform, gradual, error-driven learning mechanism operating across domains, and defuses the once-influential argument that associationist mechanisms are too limited to account for human cognitive capacities. At the same time, the successes of deep learning depend on computational architectures that go well beyond anything classical associationists envisaged, and supervised learning operates within these as one component rather than a complete account of learning.

</details>


### [488] [Specifying AI-SDLC Processes: A Protocol Language for Human-Agent Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20615)
*Ylli Prifti*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于AI-SDLC流程的领域特定语言（DSL），通过形式化语法、良构条件、操作语义和执行不变量的设计，区分策略与机制，实现对人类-Agent协作中责任边界、审批门控和治理约束的结构化表达。实验表明结构强制约束优于行为合规性，且2+N团队模式形式化了职责分离原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI-Agent在软件开发生命周期中已成为一等团队成员，但缺乏专门的语言来表达人机协作中的责任边界、审批门控和治理约束。现有方法将流程编码在Agent提示中（易漂移），或针对相邻领域（工作流管理、业务流程），或仅解决片段问题（访问控制、审批门控），缺乏统一的、形式化的规范语言。

Method: 提出一种领域特定语言，具有形式化语法、良构条件、操作语义和执行不变量的完整设计。语言区分策略（声明意图）与机制（结构强制），通过验证令牌和能力边界等原语约束流程非确定性。定义了2+N团队模式（两个人类控制角色+N个专业Agent成员）以形式化职责分离。

Result: 失败率分析表明：结构强制约束将系统失败率约束为Agent和验证器率的加权乘积，而行为合规性会导致累积或接近饱和的失败率增长。2+N团队模式形式化了AI-SDLC中的经典职责分离原则。Kleene闭包编排循环和自反协议遵守验证作为设计属性出现，而非特殊构造。已有工作实现证明可行性，实证评估留待未来工作。

Conclusion: 本文的贡献在于对多Agent框架（MetaGPT）、工作流规范（FlowAgent、BPMN扩展）和基于能力的安全（SAGA）的特定集成，而非任何单一原语的创新。实现了可行的原型系统，实证评估是未来工作方向。

Abstract: AI agents now participate as first-class team members across the software development lifecycle, yet no specification language exists for expressing the human-agent responsibility boundaries, approval gates, and governance constraints this collaboration requires. Existing approaches encode process in agent prompts (subject to drift), target adjacent domains (workflow management, business processes), or address only fragments (access control, approval gates).
  We propose a domain-specific language for specifying AI-SDLC processes as protocols, with formal syntax, well-formedness conditions, operational semantics, and enforcement invariants. The language distinguishes policy (declared intent) from mechanism (structural enforcement), enabling implementations to bound process non-determinism through primitives such as validation tokens and capability boundaries.
  Three results follow. A failure rate analysis shows that structural enforcement bounds system failure rates at a weighted product of agent and validator rates, while behavioral compliance permits cumulative or near-saturating growth. The 2+N team pattern (two human-in-control roles plus N specialized agent members) formalizes classical Separation of Duties for AI-SDLC. Kleene closure of orchestration loops and reflexive protocol-adherence validation emerge as design properties rather than special-case constructs.
  We position the contribution against multi-agent frameworks (MetaGPT), workflow specification (FlowAgent, BPMN extensions), and capability-based security (SAGA): the novelty lies in the specific integration, not any single primitive. A working implementation demonstrates feasibility; empirical evaluation is future work.

</details>


### [489] [PEAR: Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20621)
*Yang Feng,Ziwei Xu,Xia Hu,Fengxiang He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PEAR是一种置换等变自适应路由多智能体辩论协议，通过动态重新配置通信角色和稀疏拓扑，防止固定位置偏差，在四个推理基准和六个LLM骨干上显著优于现有辩论基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有固定拓扑的多智能体辩论存在持续性位置偏差、不可靠智能体被放大以及对角色分配高度敏感等问题，限制了LLM推理的可靠性。

Method: 提出PEAR协议，在连续辩论轮次中基于智能体状态动态重新配置角色分配和稀疏拓扑，通过置换等变稀疏路由器实现在智能体重标号下保持准确性，同时降低路由复杂度并提升泛化能力。

Result: 在四个推理基准和六个多样化LLM骨干上的全面实证评估表明，PEAR相对于最强辩论基线显著提升了平均准确率。

Conclusion: PEAR通过自适应路由有效解决了固定拓扑辩论的偏差问题，是一种更高效、更鲁棒的多智能体辩论协议。

Abstract: Multi-agent debate improves the reliability of large language models (LLMs) through iterative peer critiques. However, fixed topologies often introduce persistent positional biases, amplify unreliable agents, and cause high sensitivity to role assignments. We introduce \textit{Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate (PEAR)}, an inference-time protocol that dynamically reconfigures communication roles and sparse topologies across consecutive debate rounds. By strategically switching agent-to-role assignments based on evolving agent states, PEAR prevents any agent from permanently occupying a privileged network position or distributes influence more evenly across the debate. We theoretically characterize PEAR as an equivariant sparse router: it preserves accuracy under agent relabeling while reducing routing complexity and improving generalization. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across four reasoning benchmarks and six diverse LLM backbones demonstrate PEAR significantly improves average accuracy over the strongest debate baselines. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/PEAR.

</details>


### [490] [Learning Filters with Certainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22786)
*Yuval Banoun,Daniel Sadoc Menasche,Ori Rottenstreich*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了计数布隆过滤器（CBF）中计数器提供的确定性信息，并展示了如何利用这一信号改进结合布隆过滤器与机器学习模型的架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统哈希数据结构（如布隆过滤器）只返回二元指示（是否存在），忽略了哈希冲突带来的确定性信息。作者认为这种确定性本身是有用信息，值得利用。

Method: 聚焦于计数布隆过滤器（CBF），利用其维护的计数器信息来估计正向成员指示的确定性，并将该确定性信号集成到布隆过滤器与机器学习模型结合的架构中。

Result: 展示了如何利用CBF的确定性信号来增强结合布隆过滤器与机器学习模型的系统性能。

Conclusion: CBF计数器提供的确定性信息具有实用价值，可被有效利用来改进混合架构中布隆过滤器与机器学习模型的协作效果。

Abstract: Hash-based data structures such as Bloom filters are widely used in network systems for tasks including caching, anomaly detection, and machine learning pipelines. They typically provide binary indications of whether an element belongs to a set of interest, e.g., the contents of a cache. When uncertainty arises due to hash collisions, a positive indication is returned to avoid false negatives. We argue that the certainty associated with such indications can itself be useful information. This work focuses on Counting Bloom Filters (CBFs), a Bloom-filter variant that maintains counters rather than bits. Besides supporting insertions and deletions, these counters provide additional information that can be used to estimate the certainty of positive membership indications. We show how this certainty signal can be exploited in architectures that combine Bloom Filters with machine learning (ML) models.

</details>


### [491] [Darwin Mobile Agent: A Roadmap for Self-Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20622)
*Daniel Beechey,Derek Yuen,Jianheng Liu,Dezhao Luo,Tiantian He,Weilin Luo,Jun Wang,Kun Shao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出通过移动GUI作为“大世界”代理，构建Darwin Mobile Agent开源基础设施，实现自主强化学习，并规划逐步去除人类先验的路线图，以迈向真正自主进化的GUI智能体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 创造能在开放环境中具有通用、自适应行为的AI智能体，受"Bitter Lesson"启发，认为最有效路径是系统地去除人类先验，让智能在与远超自身复杂度的"大世界"交互中自然涌现。

Method: 提出移动图形用户界面(GUI)作为"大世界"的实用代理；构建Darwin Mobile Agent开源框架，通过跨并行云手机实例的异步智能体-环境循环解决数据收集瓶颈；提出从任务课程、结果验证和记忆管理三个支柱系统去除人类先验的概念路线图。

Result: 验证了Darwin基础设施在GUI领域策略优化的第一阶段提供了所需的稳定性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: 本研究为迈向真正自主、自我进化的GUI智能体奠定了实践和理论基础。

Abstract: The goal of artificial intelligence is to create agents capable of general, adaptive behaviour in open-ended environments. Guided by the "Bitter Lesson", we argue that the most effective path toward this goal is to systematically remove human priors and allow intelligence to naturally emerge through interaction with a "Big World" that is orders of magnitude more complex than the agent itself. We propose the mobile Graphical User Interface (GUI) as a practical proxy for such a world and introduce Darwin Mobile Agent, an open-source infrastructure designed as a foundation for autonomous reinforcement learning in this domain. This framework addresses the data-collection bottleneck in real-world mobile interactions by using an asynchronous agent-environment loop across parallel cloud-phone instances. We further propose a conceptual roadmap to systematically remove human priors from three fundamental pillars of a self-evolving agent: task curricula, outcome verification, and memory management. We validate that the Darwin infrastructure provides the stability and scalability required for the first stage of this roadmap: policy optimisation in the GUI domain. This work establishes the practical and theoretical foundation necessary to move toward truly autonomous, self-evolving GUI agents.

</details>


### [492] [Path-dependent program induction under resource constraints explains human sequence learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20623)
*Hanqi Zhou,David G. Nagy,Peter Dayan,Charley M. Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文整合率-失真理论与程序归纳方法，提出分层适应语法（HAG）模型，通过局部和全局知识库的联合约束，在有限认知资源下解释人类如何从序列经验中构建抽象、可复用的知识。实验表明HAG在率-失真权衡和泛化上优于固定语法和浅层分块方法，在线旋律学习实验中用户回忆错误和反应时模式支持模型预测，分层库模型最好地解释了个体差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索人类在有限认知资源下，如何从序列经验中构建抽象、可复用的知识，并解释先验知识如何塑造未来结构的编码成本与发现难度。

Method: 整合率-失真理论与程序归纳，提出分层适应语法（HAG），包含局部（任务内）和全局（任务间）两种知识库，受记忆和计算约束共同调控。通过模拟实验和在线旋律序列学习实验验证。

Result: HAG在率-失真权衡和泛化能力上优于固定语法和浅层分块方法。在线实验中，参与者回忆错误呈现系统简化模式，反应时在推断的程序边界处增加。试次级拟合显示分层库模型最好地解释了个体在回忆和续写选择中的差异。

Conclusion: 结构化学习可被视为有界程序归纳过程，其中经验的顺序塑造了学习者未来构建的抽象知识。

Abstract: How do people build abstract, reusable knowledge from sequential experience under bounded cognitive resources? To answer this question, we integrate rate-distortion theory with recent advances in program induction to describe how prior knowledge shapes which future structures are cheap to encode and easy to discover. We formalize this in a hierarchical Adaptor Grammar (HAG) with distinct local (within-task) and global (across-task) libraries, governed jointly by constraints on memory and computation. In simulations, HAG achieves better rate-distortion trade-offs and stronger generalization than fixed grammars or shallow chunking methods. In an online melodic sequence-learning experiment, participants' recall errors reflected systematic simplifications and reaction times increased at inferred program boundaries. Trial-by-trial fits further showed that hierarchical libraries best explained individual differences in both recall and out-of-sample continuation choices, outperforming all alternative models. These findings cast structured learning as bounded program induction in which the order of experience shapes future abstractions a learner builds.

</details>


### [493] [In LLM Reasoning, there is Irrationality on top of Value Misalignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20624)
*Kejiang Qian,Fengxiang He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"理性价值风险"概念，形式化定义了LLM在推理时与理性决策之间的效用差距，并通过大量实验证明该风险普遍存在、价值观对齐无法完全消除、对推理策略高度敏感，且长链推理存在边际效益递减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 即使LLM在训练阶段已经良好对齐人类价值观，在推理阶段仍可能无法最大化对齐价值，存在效用差距。作者旨在形式化这一差距并系统分析其成因与特性。

Method: 数学形式化定义了理性价值风险（rational value risk），将其估计误差分解为有限候选、有限提示和不完美验证器三个组成部分。在多个模型家族（Llama-3.1, Qwen-2.5, Tulu-3, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.5, DeepSeek-V4）和多个基准（UltraFeedback, AlpacaEval, GSM8K, MATH, HumanEval, MathArena）上进行实验验证。

Result: (1) 理性价值风险普遍存在；(2) 价值观对齐可以降低但无法消除该风险；(3) 该风险对推理时策略高度敏感；(4) 更长推理能提升理性但存在边际效益递减。

Conclusion: LLM在推理阶段存在独立于训练对齐的理性偏差，需要通过推理策略优化来进一步缩小与理性决策的差距。

Abstract: Significant progress has been made in aligning LLMs with target value functions. We argue that, even when an LLM has been well aligned in (post-)training, it may still fail to maximise the aligned value in reasoning. We mathematically formalise this gap as rational value risk: the utility discrepancy between a model's deployed reasoning strategy and its rational counterpart, which is defined to be the responses that maximise expected utility in the steepest direction. The estimation error of rational value risk is further decomposed into three components from finite candidates, finite prompts, and imperfect verifiers. Extensive experiments are conducted, covering models Llama-3.1, Qwen-2.5, T{\"}ulu-3 families (7B-72B), GPT-5.2, GPT-5.5, and DeepSeek-V4, and benchmarks UltraFeedback, AlpacaEval, GSM8K, MATH, HumanEval, and MathArena. The results validate that (1) rational value risk is widespread; (2) value alignment can reduce, but cannot eliminate, it; (3) the risk is highly sensitive to inference-time reasoning strategy; and (4) longer reasoning improves rationality with diminishing returns. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/LLM-Rationality.

</details>


### [494] [AlphaMemo: Structured Search-Process Memory for Self-Evolving Alpha Mining Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20625)
*Hang Yu,Zifan Zheng,Jeff Z. Pan,Tongliang Liu,Zhiyong Wang,Fengxiang He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AlphaMemo是一个结合结构化搜索过程记忆的自我进化因子挖掘智能体，通过AST差异提取编辑模板、置信门控残差记忆和非对称否决控制机制，在CSI 500和S&P 500上提升了样本外表现和固定预算下的发现效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体在因子挖掘中面临组合搜索空间大、反馈噪声非平稳、发现冗余以及过度利用过去成功经验导致过拟合等问题，现有方法（仅记忆最终因子或完整轨迹）难以有效应对这些挑战。

Method: 提出AlphaMemo，核心创新包括：1) 从AST差异中提取可复用的编辑模板（motif）；2) 在搜索分类账先验之上构建置信门控残差记忆；3) 采用非对称否决控制机制抑制高置信失败模式，实现结构化搜索过程记忆。

Result: 在CSI 500和S&P 500数据集上的实验表明，AlphaMemo在样本外表现和固定预算下的发现效率方面均优于基线；消融实验验证了残差学习、置信门控、AST差异模板和否决记忆等各组件的有效性。

Conclusion: AlphaMemo通过结构化记忆机制有效提升了因子挖掘智能体的搜索效率和泛化能力，代码已开源。

Abstract: LLM agents are promising for alpha mining via combining financial priors, symbolic reasoning, executable factor generation, and feedback-driven refinement. Yet, they face a combinatorial search space, noisy non-stationary feedback, redundant discoveries, and overfitting risks from naively reusing past successes. To address these challenges, we propose AlphaMemo, a self-evolving alpha mining agent with Structured Search-Process Memory. Rather than memorizing only final factors or full trajectories, AlphaMemo records reusable evidence about which edit motifs work or fail under specific parent-factor contexts. It extracts motifs from Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) differences, applies confidence-gated residual memory on top of a search-ledger prior, and uses asymmetric veto control to suppress high-confidence failure patterns. Experiments on CSI 500 and S\&P 500 show improved out-of-sample performance and fixed-budget discovery efficiency, with ablations validating the roles of residual learning, confidence gating, AST-diff motifs, and veto memory. Code is at https://github.com/jarrettyu/AlphaMemo.

</details>


### [495] [Latent Goal Prediction from Language for Model-Based Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20627)
*Samuel Barbeau,Simon Roy,Giovanni Beltrame,Christian Desrosiers,Nicolas Thome*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LAGO提出了一种从语言指令预测潜在子目标序列并在同一潜在空间中进行动作条件 rollout 的框架，通过在线更新子目标和软最小轨迹成本规划，实现了长视界下鲁棒且精确的语言引导规划，避免了复合预测误差和跨模态对齐噪声等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于世界模型的规划受限于复合预测误差和优化目标定义的困境：视觉目标提供精确局部梯度但缺乏远距离引导，语言目标灵活却受跨模态对齐噪声或大模型采样效率低的制约。

Method: LAGO从语言指令预测中间目标状态的序列（潜在子目标）和动作条件 rollout，两者在同一潜在空间中进行。采用动态在线更新子目标的方式，并在规划中使用软最小轨迹成本（soft minimum trajectory cost），将语言指令动态分解为局部可处理的潜在子目标序列。

Result: 在多个环境和规划视界上的评估表明，LAGO避免了先前方法的性能急剧退化，实现了鲁棒且精确的长视界规划。

Conclusion: LAGO桥接了视觉目标的精确性与文本引导控制的灵活性，实现了纯语言驱动的长视界鲁棒规划。

Abstract: Planning with world models is bottlenecked by compounding prediction errors and the difficulty of defining optimizable goals. Visual targets provide precise local gradients but poor distant guidance, while language is flexible yet limited by noisy cross-modal alignment or dependence on large generative models unsuited for the high-sampling nature of model-based planning. To address these challenges, we introduce Latent Goal Prediction from Language (LAGO), a framework that predicts both sequences of intermediate goal states from language instructions and action-conditioned rollouts, all within the same latent space. Rather than optimizing toward a single global objective, LAGO dynamically decomposes instructions into explicitly predicted, locally tractable latent subgoals. By updating these subgoals online and using a soft minimum trajectory cost during planning, LAGO enables an agent to follow coherent latent trajectories over long horizons. Evaluation across multiple environments planning horizons shows that LAGO avoids the sharp degradation of prior methods. By achieving robust and precise long-horizon planning purely from language, LAGO bridges the precision of visual goals with the flexibility of text-guided control.

</details>


### [496] [Human Decision-Making with AI Assistance under Correlated Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20628)
*Yanru Guan,Naveen Raman,Fei Fang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文研究了AI辅助决策中，当特征相关时，如何推荐测试以平衡短期决策质量和长期人类学习。证明特征相关会导致固定策略表现极差，最优策略需遵循"先探索后承诺"结构，并提出了动态规划算法和近似方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究在特征独立时已证明固定策略最优，但现实场景中特征往往相关（如医疗诊断中不同检查结果存在关联），此时固定策略可能失效。需要探索在特征相关条件下如何设计AI推荐策略，以平衡人类短期决策准确性和长期学习效果。

Method: 理论证明特征相关下固定策略的次优性；推导最优策略需遵循先探索后承诺结构；证明计算最优策略是NP-hard问题；提出基于动态规划的有限时域最优算法；开发基于短时域规划加固定后缀的近似方法。

Result: 特征相关越强，所需的探索阶段越长；动态规划算法能求解有限时域最优策略；近似方法能达到接近最优的性能。

Conclusion: 在特征相关场景下，AI辅助决策系统不应使用固定推荐策略，而应采用先探索后承诺的自适应策略，探索长度需根据特征相关程度动态调整。

Abstract: Humans increasingly make decisions with AI assistance; for example, doctors may follow AI-recommended diagnostic tests and base their diagnoses on the results. A natural question is which tests should AI recommend to balance short-term decision quality and long-term human learning when different features (e.g., test results) are correlated. While prior work establishes that stationary policies that recommend the same tests repeatedly are optimal when features are independent, we prove that feature correlations lead such policies to perform arbitrarily poorly. Instead, we prove that any optimal policy must follow an explore-then-commit structure; initially, the AI should offer diverse tests so humans can learn accurate feature coefficients, then the AI should commit to a single set of tests, with exploration length that depends on the degree of feature correlation. We prove that computing the optimal policy is NP-hard and derive a dynamic programming-based algorithm that finds the optimal policy for finite horizons. We additionally develop an approximation that plans for shorter horizons and appends a stationary suffix, achieving near-optimal performance. Our empirical results complement our theory by showing that stronger feature correlation leads to longer exploration phases.

</details>


### [497] [Harnessing Agent Skills: Architectural Patterns and a Reference Architecture for Skill-Mediated LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20631)
*Boming Xia,Liming Zhu,Zhenchang Xing,Qinghua Lu,Dino Sejdinovic,Xiwei Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了智能体技能利用的架构责任，提出了10种经验性架构模式（5核心+5辅助），并将其综合为包含四个责任层（供应链、中介、执行控制、证据与反馈）的参考架构，通过8个系统验证，为分析智能体系统中的技能利用提供了词汇和诊断框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 技能工件在静态存储时是被动的，但在运行时被选、绑定上下文和权限、由随机智能体解释并记录为运行证据，形成"使用中的技能"（skill-in-use）。现有研究缺乏对从技能工件到使用中技能这一转换过程所涉及的架构责任的系统化理解。

Method: 基于经验性研究，提炼出10种架构模式（5种核心模式+5种辅助模式），并将其综合为四层参考架构：供应链层、中介层、执行控制层、证据与反馈层。通过8个选定的系统进行跨实例化评估。

Result: 提出了一个包含四个责任层的参考架构，并通过8个系统的跨实例化验证了其有效性，为分析和比较不同智能体系统的技能利用架构责任提供了统一词汇和诊断框架。

Conclusion: 本文的模式和参考架构为研究人员和工程师提供了一个系统化的工具集，用于理解、分析和设计LLM智能体系统中技能从静态工件到运行时利用的完整架构责任链条。

Abstract: Agent skills externalise reusable agent-facing behavioural knowledge and guidance as persistent artefacts that can be discovered, activated, and interpreted by LLM agents. Although a skill artefact is static at rest, its architectural responsibilities arise in use, when the artefact is selected for a run, bound to context and authority constraints, interpreted by a stochastic agent, and recorded as run evidence. We call this run-specific relation skill-in-use. This paper studies agent skill harnessing: the architectural responsibilities that govern the transition from skill artefacts to skill-in-use, bound the executable consequences associated with skill-in-use, and capture evidence for attribution, verification, repair, and evolution. This paper provides a catalogue of ten empirically grounded architectural patterns (five core, five supporting) for skill harnessing and synthesises them into a reference architecture with four responsibility layers: Supply Chain, Mediation, Execution Control, and Evidence & Feedback. We evaluate the architecture through cross-instantiation across 8 selected systems. The resulting patterns and reference architecture provide a vocabulary and diagnostic frame for analysing skill-harnessing responsibilities across agent systems.

</details>


### [498] [DEMM-Bench: A Cross-Regime Benchmark for Agent-Runtime Governance-Evidence Sufficiency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20634)
*Oleg Solozobov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DEMM-Bench是一个面向智能体运行时治理证据充分性的跨体制基准，通过决策证据成熟度模型（DEMM）衡量八个证据体制的记录是否足以重建决策级属性，而非仅呈现表面记录。实验表明，现有基线存在严重过度声明，而所提出的属性级评分器在零过度声明下达到56.25%的平均属性充分性准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体运行时系统产生大量轨迹、账本、溯源图、策略日志等记录，但这些容器并不能直接回答关于特定决策的治理问题，缺乏衡量决策证据充分性的标准化方法。

Method: 构建DEMM-Bench基准，基于决策证据成熟度模型（DEMM），通过适配器标准化八个证据体制，提出八类属性问题（参与者、权威、行动、策略、决策依据、资源接触、生命周期上下文、验证强度），并应用八种确定性退化条件，在64个手稿案例上进行评估。

Result: trace-present和schema-present基线在75%的案例上过度声明，ledger-present基线在50%上过度声明；所提出的属性级候选评分器零过度声明，平均属性充分性准确率为56.25%。

Conclusion: 该基准提供了一个包含64案例数据集、构造oracle标签、基线和适配器的可复现评估包，支持跨异构智能体运行时证据基质的决策证据成熟度可复现评估。

Abstract: Agent-runtime systems emit traces, ledgers, provenance graphs, policy logs, delegation tokens, cache events, and tool-firewall records, but those containers do not necessarily answer governance questions about a specific decision. DEMM-Bench is a cross-regime benchmark for agent-runtime governance-evidence sufficiency, grounded in the Decision Evidence Maturity Model (DEMM): it measures whether records across eight evidence regimes are sufficient to reconstruct decision-level properties rather than merely present. The benchmark normalizes the regimes through adapters, asks property questions over actor, authority, action, policy, decision basis, resource touch, lifecycle context, and verification strength, and applies eight deterministic degradation conditions. Across 64 manuscript cases, trace-present and schema-present baselines overclaim on 75% of cases, ledger-present overclaims on 50%, and the redacted property-level candidate scorer has zero overclaim with 56.25% mean Property Sufficiency Accuracy. The deposited package provides the 64-case dataset, construction-oracle labels, baselines, and adapters, supporting reproducible evaluation of decision-evidence maturity across heterogeneous agent-runtime evidence substrates.

</details>


### [499] [SkillHarness: Harnessing Safe Skills for Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20636)
*Yurun Chen,Biao Yi,Keting Yin,Shengyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SkillHarness是一个针对动态交互环境中计算机使用代理(Computer-Use Agents)的安全技能学习与利用框架。该框架通过引入技能边界(skill boundary)概念，利用多源监督信号从交互轨迹中识别安全技能，并构建自改进的安全约束，同时采用选择性技能复用来根据上下文分解任务并激活合适技能子集。实验表明，该方法将学习技能的不安全率降低57.1%，并在动态环境变化下持续提升执行稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的计算机使用代理(CUA)技能学习方法主要假设静态安全环境，忽略了对抗性交互（如提示注入）和环境动态变化（如弹窗）带来的风险。这种假设导致在动态环境中可能学习到有风险的技能并产生脆弱的执行过程，严重影响CUA的可靠性。

Method: SkillHarness将技能学习与利用建模为安全约束的交互过程。核心创新包括：(1) 技能边界(skill boundary)——利用多源监督信号从交互轨迹中识别安全技能；(2) 自改进安全约束——在技能全生命周期中构建持续优化的安全约束；(3) 选择性技能复用——根据上下文指导任务分解并通过选择性激活技能子集完成任务。

Result: SkillHarness将学习技能的不安全率降低57.1%，并在动态环境变化下持续提升执行稳定性，在各项指标上优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过引入安全约束驱动的技能边界和选择性技能复用机制，SkillHarness有效解决了动态环境中计算机使用代理的安全技能学习问题，为CUA在实际动态场景中的可靠部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) are increasingly deployed in dynamic interactive environments, creating a growing need for continual skill learning during interaction. Recent approaches address this challenge by learning reusable skills from successful trajectories. However, these skill learning methods largely assume static and safe environments, overlooking risks from adversarial interactions (e.g., prompt injections) and environmental dynamics (e.g., pop-ups). In dynamic settings, such assumptions can lead to risky skill learning and brittle execution, undermining the reliability of CUAs. This raises the question: how can CUAs learn and use skills safely in dynamic environments? To address this problem, we propose SkillHarness, a framework for safe skill harnessing in dynamic environments. SkillHarness moves beyond static skill abstractions by modeling skill learning and utilization as a safety-constrained interaction process. Specifically, we introduce the skill boundary that leverages multi-source supervision signals to identify safe skills from interaction trajectories, and construct self-improving safety constraints throughout the skill lifecycle. In addition, SkillHarness introduces selective skill reuse, where tasks are guided to decompose according to context and completed through the selective activation of skill subsets. Our experiments demonstrate that SkillHarness significantly reduces the unsafe rate of learned skills by 57.1% and consistently improves execution stability under dynamic environmental changes, outperforming existing baselines.

</details>


### [500] [Constituency Optimisation Through Hamiltonian Representation Of Mandates (COTHROM): Algorithmic Redistricting of Irish Election Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20637)
*Ruaidhrí Campion,Matthew Fenlon,Joshua Cooney Mercedal,Casey Farren-Colloty,Eliza Somerville,Michael A. J. Mitchell*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出首个面向爱尔兰PR-STV选举系统的计算重划选区框架COTHRON，利用统计物理（Potts哈密顿量）、MCMC模拟退火和多准则决策分析（Pareto最优）在多目标权衡下优化选区边界，在科克郡的实验中优于现有法定选区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 爱尔兰PR-STV选举制度下的选区重划面临巨大配置空间，且宪法目标（比例代表性、紧凑性等）相互冲突，缺乏可量化的系统优化方法。

Method: 将选区重划问题映射为统计物理中的Potts哈密顿量（各宪法目标作为能量项），采用MCMC和模拟退火最小化目标函数，耦合常数作为目标权重；再引入MCDA和Pareto最优性解决权重选择歧义。

Result: 在科克郡的实验中，针对比例代表性和紧凑性目标，COTHRON框架在各种权重组合下均一致优于现有法律选区边界。

Conclusion: 该计算框架能系统优化多宪法目标并量化权衡，为爱尔兰选区重划提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Electoral redistricting in Ireland's Proportional Representation Single Transferable Vote (PR-STV) system faces the challenge of selecting an optimally representative set of electoral boundaries from an enormous set of possible configurations, and where ``representative'' is a delicate balance of constitutional objectives that are often in tension with one another. We present the first computational framework for Irish electoral redistricting that systematically optimises across multiple constitutional requirements while making trade-offs explicit and quantifiable. The electoral redistricting problem is parsed using statistical physics, where constitutional objectives are considered as terms in a Potts Hamiltonian. Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods and simulated annealing are employed to minimise this objective function, systematically exploring this configuration space, with coupling constants as proxies for objective weightings. Multi Criterion Decision Analysis (MCDA) and Pareto Optimality is then utilised to remedy the ambiguity in choosing a certain objective weighting combination over others. With respect to proportional representation and compactness objectives evaluated in County Cork, COTHROM consistently improves on the existing legal constituency boundaries for a range of objective weightings.

</details>


### [501] [RIZZ: Routing Interactions to Near Zero-Interference Zones for Continual Adaptation of Black-Box Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20638)
*Sonali Goel,Pranav Vaidhyanathan,Lucas Schorling,Natalia Ares,Maike Osborne*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RIZZ是一个面向黑盒大语言模型智能体的持续适应框架，通过验证器门控记忆、路由和提示编译，在不访问模型权重的情况下实现零干扰在线适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有黑盒适应方法（单提示优化、无区分记忆、重复搜索）在非平稳输入流、稀疏反馈和跨任务干扰场景下表现不佳，需要一种能显式控制干扰、支持在线持续适应的框架。

Method: RIZZ将输入流组织为动态生成的内存分支，推理时由上下文感知路由器选择或创建分支，整合分支本地、全局、图结构和工作记忆上下文，编译为有界提示。模型动作后，任务验证器评分，仅通过验证的交互更新记忆、促进/降级规则或创建反模式。

Result: 在竞争性基准测试中，RIZZ框架优于现有最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: RIZZ通过验证器门控记忆、路由和提示编译，实现了黑盒智能体在上下文预算约束下的在线持续适应，有效控制任务间干扰，为长周期部署的LLM智能体提供了可行的适应方案。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as long-lived agents that must adapt across users, tasks, domains, modalities, and feedback regimes without access to model weights. Existing black-box adaptation methods typically optimize a single prompt, maintain an undifferentiated memory, or rely on repeated rollout-heavy search. However, these designs struggle when streams of input are nonstationary, feedback is sparse, and failures from one task family can contaminate behavior on another. We introduce RIZZ (Routing Interactions to Near Zero-interference Zones), a continual adaptation framework for compound language-model systems that learns entirely through verifier-gated memory, routing, and prompt compilation. RIZZ organizes input streams into dynamically spawned memory branches. At inference time, either while online or offline, a context-aware router selects or creates a branch that retrieves branch-local, global, graph-structured, and working-memory context, which is compiled into a bounded prompt together with retrieved task evidence. After the model acts, task verifiers score the output, and only verified interactions can update memory, promote reusable rules, demote harmful rules, or create anti-patterns. This yields a black-box agent that improves through persistent natural-language feedback while explicitly controlling interference. RIZZ targets the regime where adaptation must occur online under context budgets. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework against state-of-the-art baselines on competitive benchmarks.

</details>


### [502] [An LLM-Explainable DRL Framework for Passenger-Directed Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20640)
*Ouided Braoui,Meriem Bouali,Nadir Farhi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种结合深度强化学习（DRL）与大型语言模型（LLM）的框架，用于实现自动驾驶车辆的适应性驾驶控制与可解释性。DRL代理通过Dueling Double Deep Q-Network在仿真中训练，能够根据乘客的“快速”、“舒适”和“停止”等驾驶请求进行模式切换并安全行驶；LLM模块则负责解释乘客请求、判断何时需要解释，并生成简洁的安全导向说明。实验结果表明，该框架在安全性、适应性和可解释性之间取得了平衡，尤其在请求因安全约束被延迟或覆盖时效果最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶车辆虽然有望实现更安全高效的出行，但其决策过程缺乏透明度，导致公众信任度有限。为此，本文旨在通过结合DRL与LLM，提升自动驾驶系统的可解释性和乘客信任。

Method: 采用Dueling Double Deep Q-Network训练DRL代理，使其在仿真环境中学习“快速”、“舒适”和“停止”三种驾驶模式并安全切换；同时引入LLM模块，用于解释乘客请求、判断解释时机并生成安全导向的简洁说明。

Result: DRL代理表现出稳定的学习能力、安全遵守交通规则的能力，以及在同一行程中可靠切换驾驶模式的能力。LLM模块能够有效生成解释。该框架在安全性、适应性和可解释性之间取得了平衡，尤其在请求被延迟或因安全约束被覆盖时效果最佳。

Conclusion: 本文提出的DRL+LLM框架作为概念验证，展示了将强化学习决策与LLM可解释性相结合的有效性，能够在保障安全的同时提升自动驾驶系统的透明度和用户信任。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles offer the potential for safer and more efficient mobility, yet public trust remains limited due to the lack of transparency in their decision-making. This work addresses this issue by combining deep reinforcement learning (DRL) for adaptive driving control with large language model (LLM)-based explainability modules designed to communicate agent behavior to passengers. DRL agents were trained in simulation using a Dueling Double Deep Q-Network to follow distinct driving requests: \textit{fast}, \textit{comfort}, and \textit{stop}. They demonstrated stable learning, safe compliance with traffic rules, and reliable switching between modes within a single trip. In parallel, LLM modules were introduced to interpret passenger requests, determine when explanations were needed, and generate concise, safety-oriented justifications. Results show that this framework, serving as a proof of concept for integrating RL decision-making and LLMs, balances safety, adaptability, and explainability, and is most effective when requests are delayed or overridden due to safety constraints.

</details>


### [503] [Hypothesis-Disciplined Multi-Agent Automated Formalization of Asymptotic Statistical Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20642)
*Tingzhou Wei,Zeyu Zheng,Ethan X. Fang,Junwei Lu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体协作、假设约束审计的Lean 4形式化流程，成功实现了渐近统计理论（含参数与半参数模型）的系统形式化，最终得到公理清洁、忠实于原文且通过Lean检查和人工审计的证明库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 渐近统计理论的形式化面临巨大挑战：核心结果涉及收敛性陈述、渐近展开、泛函分析以及正则性条件，与Lean 4现有基础设施之间存在较大差距，亟需一种系统化的形式化方法。

Method: 提出假设约束的形式化流程：由一个管理者协调七个专业角色（证明规划、骨架搭建、Mathlib侦察、证明构建、集成、独立审查、审计）。核心方法论是审计代理执行的假设约束审计——每个主要定理的假设和概念层字段必须锚定在源数学散文中，被证明为Lean编码适配器，标记为源隐含，或被拒绝为不支持的强化。

Result: 完成了渐近统计理论的系统形式化，特别是参数与半参数模型的渐近分布和效率结果。Lean开发公理清洁、忠实于原文，通过Lean检查和人工审计，将定理无关的基础设施和统计概念定义与定理特定组装分离。

Conclusion: 所提出的多智能体假设约束形式化流程能有效弥合数学理论与形式化系统之间的差距，为复杂数学领域的AI辅助形式化提供了可行范本。

Abstract: Asymptotic statistical theory is a challenging domain for AI-assisted formalization: its central results mix convergence statements, asymptotic expansions, functional analysis, and regularity conditions that have a large gap from existing infrastructure in Lean 4 formalization. To address these challenges, we propose a hypothesis-disciplined Lean 4 formalization pipeline built from multiple agents: a manager that coordinates seven specialist roles for proof planning, skeleton scaffolding, Mathlib reconnaissance, proof construction, integration, independent review, and audit. The main methodological discipline is the hypothesis-disciplined audit, implemented by the Auditor agent: every main-theorem hypothesis and concept-layer field must be anchored in the source mathematical prose, justified as a Lean encoding adapter, marked as source-implied, or rejected as an unsupported strengthening. Using this workflow, we build a systematic formalization of asymptotic statistical theory, especially the parametric and semi-parametric models' asymptotic distribution and efficiency results. The resulting Lean development is axiom-clean and source-faithful, with Lean-checked and human-audited proofs of core parametric and semi-parametric theorems organized so that theorem-agnostic infrastructure and statistical concept definitions are separated from theorem-specific assembly. The formalization results are available at https://github.com/junwei-lu/Lean-Asymptotic-Statistical-Theory.

</details>


### [504] [SPARC: A Multi-Agent System for Electrical Circuit Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20643)
*Mushtari Sadia,Zhenning Yang,Umme Habiba Lamia,Nishat Shawrin,Ang Chen,Amrita Roy Chowdhury*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SPARC是一个多智能体系统，通过可执行的物理仿真来回答电路图问题，在准确率上达到83%，相比基线方法最高提升58%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电路图问答任务需要复杂的数学推理，而多模态大语言模型在这类任务上仍然表现不佳。现有方法缺乏对电路物理行为的精确建模和可验证的推理过程。

Method: SPARC采用多智能体架构，利用LLM智能体合成、执行和分析基于物理的仿真程序，将问答过程建立在可执行的仿真之上，而非纯语言推理。

Result: SPARC在电路图问答任务上达到83%的准确率，相比基线方法实现了最高58%的绝对提升。

Conclusion: 将推理过程锚定在可执行的物理仿真中，能够显著提升多模态LLM在电路图问答等需要数学推理任务上的准确性和可靠性，同时支持系统性的错误诊断。

Abstract: Electrical circuit diagram QA tasks require complex mathematical reasoning, which remains challenging for multimodal LLMs. We present SPARC, a multi-agent system that answers questions over circuit diagrams by grounding reasoning in executable physics-based simulations. SPARC uses LLM agents to synthesize, execute, and analyze simulation programs, improving accuracy and reliability by design. It achieves 83% accuracy, with up to a 58% absolute improvement over baselines, while enabling systematic error diagnosis.

</details>


### [505] [Bridging Multi-Valued Heuristics and Dimensionality Reduction in Multi-Objective Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20644)
*Maya Wolff,Ariel Felner,Oren Salzman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现将多维启发式（MVH）与维度缩减（DR）技术直接结合会导致搜索不正确（不完备、非最优），并提出了两个理论框架（NAMOA*dr-mvh 和 L-NAMOA*dr-mvh）来自动安全地集成两者；后者采用"惰性乐观"策略动态修复局部序关系违规，在保持精确正确性的同时，相比现有方法在多个基准上实现了超过10倍的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多目标最短路径（MOSP）算法使用单值启发式（SVH）无法捕捉帕累托前沿的权衡结构，而多维启发式（MVH）虽能提供更丰富的代价估计但现有维度缩减（DR）技术与MVH结合时存在正确性问题，简单组合会破坏DR所需的排序不变量导致搜索不可靠。

Method: 提出了两个理论框架：1) NAMOA*dr-mvh，通过强制启发式一致性来恢复搜索正确性的理论基线；2) L-NAMOA*dr-mvh，采用"惰性乐观"方法，仅使用可采纳的MVH，通过动态检测和修复局部序关系违规来实现精确正确性。

Result: 在多个基准测试上，L-NAMOA*dr-mvh 匹配或优于最先进的MOSP算法，在MVH提供额外引导可转化为更强剪枝的实例上实现了超过10倍的加速。

Conclusion: 首次为安全集成MVH与DR提供了理论基础，并通过惰性策略在保证正确性的前提下显著提升了搜索效率。

Abstract: Multi-objective shortest-path (MOSP) algorithms traditionally rely on single-valued heuristics (SVHs), which associate each state with a single admissible cost vector. While SVHs provide safe lower bounds, they fail to capture the trade-off structure of the Pareto frontier and often yield weak search guidance. Multi-valued heuristics (MVHs) address this limitation by mapping states to sets of cost estimates, enabling a richer approximation of possible trade-offs. Modern MOSP algorithms are highly dependent on dimensionality reduction (DR) techniques to efficiently perform dominance checks. However, integrating MVHs with DR introduces subtle correctness challenges. We show that naively combining DR with MVHs destroys the ordering invariants required for DR, leading to unsound and incomplete search. To address this issue, we develop the first theoretical frameworks for safely integrating MVHs with DR. First, we introduce $\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$, a theoretical baseline that restores search correctness by enforcing heuristic consistency. Recognizing the practical limitations of this approach, we then introduce our primary contribution, $\text{L}\text{-}\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$. This algorithm employs a "lazy," optimistic approach to DR, preserving exact correctness with only an admissible MVH by dynamically detecting and repairing local ordering violations. Across a range of benchmarks, $\text{L}\text{-}\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$ matches or improves over state-of-the-art MOSP algorithms, and achieves speedups of over 10x in instances where the additional guidance provided by the MVH translates into stronger pruning.

</details>


### [506] [Learning Splitting Heuristics for Parallel String Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20656)
*Chenhao Gao,Peisen Yao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，自动生成字符串约束求解器中的分裂启发式，以替代人工设计，并在Z3seq和Z3str4求解器上验证了该方法在求解公式数量和平均求解时间上优于手动设计的启发式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 字符串约束求解器在推理字符串操作程序时至关重要，但许多实际字符串约束不可判定，且现有求解器难以处理复杂约束。多核架构的兴起为并行求解提供了机会，其中的核心方法是cube-and-conquer，其分裂启发式的质量对有效划分搜索空间至关重要。然而，手动设计启发式耗时且常为次优。

Method: 将分裂原子的选择问题建模为学习任务，利用输入公式的特征和求解器执行过程中的动态数据作为特征，通过数据驱动的方式自动生成分裂启发式。

Result: 在Z3seq和Z3str4两个流行字符串求解器上实现该方法，实验结果表明，学习得到的启发式在求解公式数量和平均求解时间上均优于手动设计的启发式。

Conclusion: 数据驱动的自动生成分裂启发式方法能有效提升字符串约束求解器在并行环境下的求解性能，克服了手工设计启发式的局限性。

Abstract: String constraint solvers are crucial for reasoning about string-manipulating programs. However, many practical string constraints are undecidable, and real-world applications often present complex constraints that challenge current solvers. The rise of multi-core architectures offers an opportunity for parallel solving. A key parallel solving method is \emph{cube-and-conquer}, in which the quality of splitting heuristics is critical to effectively dividing the search space. Unfortunately, manually designing the heuristics is labor-intensive, and handcrafted heuristics are often sub-optimal. This paper introduces a data-driven approach to automatically generating splitting heuristics. We frame the problem of selecting a splitting atom as a learning task, using features from input formulas and dynamic data from solver execution. We implement this approach in two popular string solvers, Z3seq and Z3str4, demonstrating that the learned heuristics outperform manually designed ones in the number of solved formulas and the average solving time.

</details>


### [507] [A-Evolve-Training: Autonomous Post-Training of a 30B Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20657)
*Zhan Shi,Bing He,Yisi Sang,Hanqing Lu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文展示了一个无需人类干预的自主后训练系统，成功对300亿参数的Nemotron模型进行了多轮后训练，在公开排行榜上达到接近人类顶尖水平的成绩（0.86 vs 0.87），并且系统自主发现了评估指标失效的问题并主动调整了搜索策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前沿模型的后训练通常需要数周的人类工作（设计数据、调整方案、运行评估、决策取舍），本文旨在构建一个完全自主的系统来替代这一人工循环，探索大规模自主后训练的可能性。

Method: 构建了一个闭环自主系统，无需人工干预即可自动执行：提出数据与方案变更→启动训练运行→读取评估结果→决策保留哪些改进。系统在30B Nemotron上进行了四轮迭代后训练，并扩展至120B和550B规模。

Result: 自主生产的模型在NVIDIA Nemotron-Reasoning Challenge公开排行榜上达到0.86分（人类最高0.87分），在约4000个提交中排名第8。系统还自主发现开发集指标与外部性能脱钩，主动调整策略——不再最大化开发集指标，而是寻找能降低误导性代理指标同时提升外部目标的方法。

Conclusion: 本文提供了可审计的证据，表明规模化自主后训练循环不仅能完成优化，还能产生"发现"行为——系统检测到评估框架失效并主动改变证据标准。这是首个公开报道的、在30B参数规模上完成的自主后训练，远超此前公开的自主ML研究（GPT-2级别，~124M）。

Abstract: Post-training a frontier model is normally weeks of human work: proposing data and recipe changes, launching runs, reading evals, deciding what to keep. We report an autonomous system that runs this loop with no human in the loop, post-training a 30B Nemotron across four rounds over multiple weeks. The autonomously produced model reaches a held-out score of 0.86 against the top human submission's 0.87 on the public NVIDIA Nemotron-Reasoning Challenge leaderboard, placing 8th of ~4000 at the time of writing. More striking than the number: the loop detected that its own dev metric had stopped tracking external performance on the weakest domain -- candidates drove dev to record highs without moving the external target -- and revised its own search policy, no longer maximizing dev but seeking interventions that lowered the now-misleading proxy while improving the external target. We treat this as direct, auditable evidence that a scaled autonomous loop can produce discovery, not only optimization: it detected that its measurement frame had become misleading and changed what counted as evidence. We take the operational view that any system worth the "recursive self-improvement" label must eventually perform end-to-end post-training of a frontier-class model; this is one datapoint of that bar being cleared. We do not claim a "first autonomous match" of human researchers. The claim we make is narrower and auditable: to our knowledge, this is the first publicly reported autonomous post-training run at this scale, where prior public autonomous-ML-research demonstrations sit at GPT-2-class (~124M) budgets. The same system also post-trains the 120B and 550B Nemotron; with no public human baseline there, this shows only that the loop closes at that scale, not that its output is competitive -- infrastructure evidence, with the effectiveness claim deferred until a comparable human anchor exists.

</details>


### [508] [Expected Free Energy-based Planning as Variational Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20658)
*Wouter W. L. Nuijten,Thijs van de Laar,Bert de Vries*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出将主动推理中的期望自由能（EFE）规划形式化为变分自由能最小化问题，通过在生成模型中引入认知先验，使规划与感知、学习遵循统一的推理框架。实验在三个环境（确定性T-maze、随机Reactivity Maze、部分可观测MiniGrid）中验证了该方法能产生信息寻求行为、在随机环境下优于基于规划的方法，且时间因子分解使其可扩展到现有表格方法无法处理的复杂环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于EFE的规划方法通常采用专门的优化过程，难以扩展或分析。作者旨在将EFE规划统一到变分自由能框架中，实现规划与感知、学习在推理过程中的一致性。

Method: 将EFE规划重新表述为在增强认知先验的生成模型上进行变分自由能最小化。通过选择适当的先验，变分自由能分解为期望计划成本（EFE）加复杂度项。采用基于策略的推理方法，并引入时间因子分解以提升可扩展性。

Result: 三个实验验证：1）认知先验能诱导信息寻求行为；2）变分形式的策略推理在随机转移下优于规划方法；3）时间因子分解使方法可扩展到部分可观测的MiniGrid DoorKey-8x8环境，现有表格主动推理方法无法处理该环境。

Conclusion: 该工作从理论上强化了与自由能原则的一致性，将规划视为与感知和学习相同的推理过程，并提供了实用且可扩展的主动推理规划实现。

Abstract: Planning under uncertainty requires agents to balance goal achievement with information gathering. Active inference addresses this through the Expected Free Energy (EFE), a cost function that unifies instrumental and epistemic objectives. However, existing EFE-based methods typically employ specialized optimization procedures that are difficult to extend or analyze. In this paper, we show that EFE-based planning can be formulated as Variational Free Energy minimization on a generative model augmented with epistemic priors. Our main result demonstrates that minimizing a Variational Free Energy functional with appropriately chosen priors yields a decomposition into expected plan costs (the EFE) plus a complexity term. This formulation reinforces theoretical consistency with the Free Energy Principle by casting planning as the same inferential process that governs perception and learning. We validate our approach on three environments of increasing complexity: a deterministic T-maze, a stochastic Reactivity Maze, and a partially observable MiniGrid DoorKey-8x8 environment. The experiments demonstrate that the epistemic priors induce information-seeking behavior, that the variational formulation yields policy-based inference outperforming plan-based methods under stochastic transitions, and that temporal factorization enables scalability to environments where existing tabular active inference methods cannot operate.

</details>


### [509] [Skill Coverage: A Test Adequacy Metric for Agent Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20659)
*Boyin Tan,Xiaowei Huang,Youcheng Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出技能覆盖率（skill coverage）这一测试充分性度量指标，用于评估大语言模型代理在执行任务时是否充分测试了技能工件中记录的行为约束。对SkillsBench的分析表明，现有基准测试仅覆盖39.90%至43.98%的技能行为约束，说明任务成功并不等同于技能工件的充分测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估主要通过任务级结果衡量技能表现，但任务成功无法揭示技能的哪些部分被实际执行、哪些部分未被测试，缺乏对技能工件本身测试充分性的度量。

Method: 从技能文档中提取可观察的技能行为约束，并测量代理轨迹是否提供足够证据来执行和评估每个约束，采用二元覆盖/未覆盖判断，而不对行为附加额外结果标签。

Result: SkillsBench上现有基准执行仅覆盖39.90%至43.98%的技能行为约束，表明当前基准任务留下大量记录的技能指导未被测试。

Conclusion: 成功的任务完成并不意味技能工件被充分测试，技能覆盖率可作为衡量代理技能测试充分性的重要指标。

Abstract: Agent skills encode reusable procedural knowledge that guides large language model agents across tasks and execution contexts. Existing evaluations primarily assess skills through task level outcomes, yet task success alone does not reveal which parts of a skill have been exercised or which remain untested. We introduce skill coverage, a test adequacy metric that treats the skill artifact as the object under test. Our approach extracts observable skill behavior constraints from skill documents and measures whether an agent trajectory provides sufficient evidence to exercise and evaluate each constraint. Skill coverage uses a binary cover or not cover judgment, which reports whether a documented behavior has been exercised with sufficient observable evidence, without assigning an additional outcome label to the behavior. Applying skill coverage to SkillsBench reveals that existing benchmark executions cover only 39.90 to 43.98% of skill behavior constraints, suggesting that current benchmark tasks leave large portions of documented skill guidance untested. These findings show that successful task completion does not imply adequate testing of the skill artifact, highlighting skill coverage as a measure of how thoroughly agent skills are tested.

</details>


### [510] [From Knowing to Acting: Benchmarking Self-Awareness Capability of LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20661)
*Yifan Li,Shengbin Yue,Boyu Feng,Jinhu Qi,Bo Ke,Zixing Song,Hongru Wang,Zhongyu Wei,Irwin King*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出KAPRO框架和KAware数据集，用于评估LLM智能体的自我意识能力（即判断问题是否需要外部工具还是可由内部参数知识解决），发现自我意识与任务成功强相关，但开源模型存在工具过度使用问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试过度关注执行成功率，忽略了智能体的自我意识能力（即判断问题是否需要外部工具或内部知识），无法全面评估LLM智能体的认知-行为对齐程度。

Method: 提出KAPRO（Knowing-Acting Quadrant PRObe）框架，通过解耦元认知判断（Knowing）与自发执行（Acting）来评估认知-行为对齐；构建KAware数据集，将任务严格划分为外部、内部和混合子空间以系统探测认知边界。

Result: 自我意识能力与任务成功强相关，但在内部能力设置下急剧下降；开源模型和指令跟随模型因浅层模式匹配表现出更强的工具过度使用，而专有模型和推理导向模型具有更可靠的认知门控能力。

Conclusion: 自我意识是LLM智能体的关键能力，现有模型在此方面存在显著不足，特别是开源模型容易过度依赖工具，需要改进认知门控机制。

Abstract: The integration of external tools has transitioned LLM agents from passive responders to autonomous systems. However, current benchmarks prioritize execution success, neglecting self-awareness capability, the ability to discern whether a problem requires necessary external resources or can be solved via internal parametric knowledge. To address this, we introduce KAPRO (Knowing-Acting Quadrant PRObe), a framework that evaluates cognitive-behavioral alignment by decoupling an agent's metacognitive judgment (Knowing) from its spontaneous execution (Acting). We further construct KAware, a dataset rigorously partitioning tasks into external, internal, and hybrid subspaces to systematically probe these epistemic boundaries. Extensive experiments across diverse agent architectures show that self-awareness capability is strongly correlated with task success but degrades sharply in internal-capability settings. Moreover, open-source and instruction-following models exhibit stronger tool overuse due to shallow pattern matching, while proprietary and reasoning-oriented models demonstrate more reliable cognitive gating. Benchmark and codes are available at https://github.com/AI-Santiago/KAware.

</details>


### [511] [Confidence Laundering in Agent Systems: Why Uncertainty Needs a Latent Carrier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20662)
*Kaiwen Shi,Zheyuan Zhang,Han Bao,Colby Nelson,Yanfang Ye*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 现代智能体系统中，上游决策的不确定性在传递到下游组件时被过滤或掩盖，导致局部模糊性放大为系统性错误。本文提出“潜在不确定性”作为决策传递的载体，通过不确定性保持的接口设计来改善系统的可恢复性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体系统中，上游不确定决策被当作确定性中间产物传递给下游，导致不确定性在组件间传递时丢失，局部模糊性演变为系统级错误放大，即存在接口瓶颈问题。

Method: 提出“潜在不确定性”（latent uncertainty）概念，作为携带不确定性信息的载体附加到决策传递中；识别“置信洗白”（confidence laundering）作为核心失败模式；将问题从逐步不确定性估计转向不确定性保持的接口设计。

Result: 明确了不确定性在智能体系统中传播的瓶颈在于组件间接口，而非轨迹本身；揭示了置信洗白这一关键失败机制；提出了潜在不确定性作为解决方案。

Conclusion: 智能体系统的不确定性问题应从不确定性估计转向不确定性保持的接口设计，通过潜在不确定性载体实现更可恢复的系统。

Abstract: Modern agent systems can turn uncertainty into overconfidence. Fragile upstream decisions are often exposed to downstream components as clean intermediate artifacts, while the uncertainty behind those decisions is lost at the interface. As a result, local ambiguity can become system-level error amplification. We argue that this reveals an interface bottleneck in agent uncertainty propagation: uncertainty does not propagate simply because a trajectory contains uncertain steps; it propagates only when it survives the handoff between components. We define uncertain decision handoff as the transfer of an intermediate decision made under uncertainty, and identify confidence laundering as a failure mode in which fragile upstream states are repackaged as procedurally valid artifacts that downstream agents over-trust. To address this bottleneck, we propose latent uncertainty as an uncertainty-bearing carrier attached to decision handoffs. Rather than replacing text with hidden states, latent uncertainty aims to preserve pre-commitment fragility in a form that downstream components can use. This position shifts agent uncertainty propagation from step-wise uncertainty estimation toward uncertainty-preserving interface design for more recoverable agent systems.

</details>


### [512] [DrugBench: Evaluating AI Control Protocols for Medication Harm Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20663)
*Guido Freire,Agustín Martínez-Suñé,Viviana Cotik*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了DrugBench基准，用于评估AI控制协议在医疗问答中减轻药物相关危害的效果，并引入基于严重程度的监控方法以弥补现有控制协议的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在医疗问答中部署存在安全隐患，错误输出可能导致患者严重伤害。AI控制在代码生成等领域有效，但在医疗场景中的适用性和有效性尚未被系统研究。

Method: 构建了DrugBench评估基准，包含3,671个多轮医疗对话和FDA药物信息，覆盖四种药物危害类型。提出基于严重程度的监控方法，将安全定义为不仅考虑输出概率还考虑危害严重性。

Result: 现有AI控制协议在考虑危害严重性的新安全定义下可能被绕开，基于严重程度的监控方法能解决这一局限。

Conclusion: AI控制协议可应用于医疗领域，但需结合危害严重性评估；DrugBench为医疗AI安全评估提供了标准化基准。

Abstract: Large Language Models have the potential to expand and improve the access to clinical information by enabling new ways of interacting with medical knowledge in natural language. However, their deployment in medical question-answering settings is safety-critical, since misaligned outputs can lead to severe patient harm. AI control is an emerging approach that introduces external safeguards to mitigate unsafe behaviours in misaligned systems and has been shown to be effective in domains such as code generation. However, its applicability and effectiveness in medical settings have not been systematically studied. In this work, we present a pipeline for evaluating AI control protocols to mitigate medication-related harm. To this end, we introduce DrugBench, an AI control evaluation benchmark which combines 3,671 multi-turn medical conversations from HealthBench with drug information from official FDA labels, covering four categories of medication-related harm: drug interactions, contraindications, dosing constraints, and patient action restrictions.
